title: Android Developer (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose) - EdTech Startup
description:
About Us:

We're building Chameleon, a digital wellness app for K-12 schools in the United States. The app helps students develop self-regulation skills by gamifying focus time during class. Think of it as "Screen Time meets classroom gamification" - students earn points for staying focused, compete with classmates, and level up their trust privileges.

This is a ground-floor opportunity to help build something that will impact thousands of students. We have complete UI designs ready - we need a skilled developer to bring them to life.



What You'll Build:

Student App Features:



Home screen with points, streaks, and class rankings

Join classroom via 6-digit code (number pad input)

Active session screen with shield animation and timer

Leaderboard showing class competitions

Profile with achievements and trust level progress



Teacher App Features:



Dashboard showing class stats

Session setup (class name, app selection)

Real-time student monitoring grid

Session management (start/end)



Technical Work:



Build UI screens in Kotlin with Jetpack Compose (or XML if preferred)

Integrate with Firebase Firestore for real-time data sync

Implement Firebase Authentication

Handle offline mode with local Room database

Work with our Lead Developer on architecture decisions

Required Skills:

? 2+ years Android development experience

? Strong Kotlin skills

? Experience with Jetpack Compose OR Android XML layouts

? Firebase Firestore and Firebase Auth integration

? RESTful API integration

? Git version control

? Good English communication (written and verbal)

? Published at least 1 app to Google Play Store

Bonus Skills (Not Required):

? Experience with Room database

? Background services / WorkManager

? Push notifications (Firebase Cloud Messaging)

? UI/UX design sense

? Experience with EdTech or school apps

title: UChat Automations Developer - WhatsApp Flow
description:
We’re building a WhatsApp-based course delivery and need an experienced UChat developer to lead the automation side of this project. You will be developing this with n8n+Supabase developer from our team for faster implementation.



# What we’re building:

1) Users sign up on a website, receives a unique ID and is forwarded to WhatsApp (should send us this ID)

2) ID triggers UChat to pull their data from Supabase and enroll them into a course sequence

3) Based on the data we pulled out (language, format audio/video, course_name) we will provide certain content to a user



# Your job for this prototype:

Build a 10-day WhatsApp course sequence in UChat. Each day’s lesson is delivered in this exact structure:

1. Message 1 Variable (text)

2. Message 2 Variable (text)

3. Media Dynamic Block: native audio file or link with preview. Pulled dynamically from Supabase or any cloud database that could match

4. Question Variable: “How many people did you share today’s lesson with?” (and their answer will be sent to Supabase)



(!) All content (messages, audio URLs, media links) is pulled dynamically from Supabase, nothing is hardcoded in UChat.



Timing is critical:

? Day 1 sends immediately on enrollment

? Day 2 sends 23h 45min after Day 1 (to keep the 24-hour WhatsApp conversation window open and avoid template message costs)

? Same logic applies for Days 3–10. We try to make them engage during previous days to stay inside 24h window as much as possible. If 24h is off, we send them a WhatsApp template so they could engage with is and we could continue the course

? Share count answers from users must be saved back to Supabase



# Tech environment:

? UChat (you lead this — this is your core responsibility)

? Supabase (database — another dev helps you with it)

? n8n (automation middleware — the same developer helps you with it)



# You must have:

? Strong hands-on UChat experience (probably connected via 360dialog)

? Experience with HTTP request nodes and dynamic content from external databases

? Understanding of WhatsApp’s 24-hour conversation window and how to work within it



This is a paid prototype with strong potential to continue into full product development for the right person. This prototype should be finished within a week preferably ?



?? Please share examples of UChat flows you’ve built, especially any involving dynamic content or external database integration.

title: Lead Qualifier/QA & Follow-Up VA — (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Lead Qualifier/QA & Follow-Up VA For U.S. Real Estate Marketing Company (Full-Time, Remote)



**Location:** Remote

**Hours:** Full-time | 8 hours/day | Monday–Friday (Opportunity to work more hours if needed)

**Pay:** $3–$5/hour USD (based on experience) + bonus per qualified lead

**Start Date:** ASAP



---



About the Company



US-based real estate investment marketing company. Outbound cold calling marketing company, lead nurturing, and appointment setting for real estate clients across the United States. Your job is to review what happened on those calls and make sure the right leads get submitted to our clients and follow up with leads that may not be ready yet.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



This is a detail-oriented, process-driven role. Every day you will:



- **Read call transcripts** from real estate lead campaigns and determine whether each lead is qualified, unqualified, or needs follow-up

- **Fill out a qualification form** in our internal dashboard for every call you review — accuracy is critical

- **Update lead statuses** in Google Sheets and our CRM after each review

- **Make outbound follow-up calls** to leads who showed interest but need a human touchpoint to move forward

- **Communicate updates and flag issues** to the team via Slack



You will NOT be doing cold calling. These are warm leads who have already spoken with our team — you are the human follow-through.



---



## You're a Great Fit If You:



- Have **experience in real estate, lead generation, or sales support** (Required)

- Have done **outbound calling or phone follow-up work** before

- Are **extremely organized** — you will be reviewing high volumes of transcripts daily

- Have a **strong/fluent command of written and spoken English**

- Are **honest and detail-oriented** — we verify all work. Inaccurate form submissions or missed follow-ups will be rejected.

- Can work **independently without hand-holding** — you'll have clear processes, but you need to own your queue

- Have a **quiet workspace and fast, reliable internet** for outbound calls



---



## Tools You'll Use (provided)



- **Google Sheets** — lead tracking and status updates

- **Internal Dashboard** — transcript review and form submission

- **Slack** — team communication and task updates

- **Calling platform** — for manual outbound follow-up calls



---



## Compensation



| Base Pay | $3.00–$5.00/hr USD (based on experience and interview) |

| Lead Bonus | Paid per qualified lead confirmed through your follow-up

| Payment |bi-weekly via direct transfer



---



## How to Apply



To be considered, you **must** include the following in your application:



1. Your resume and verified work history (PDF preferred)

2. A short voice or video recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining any relevant experience — **this is required, text-only applications will not be reviewed**

3. Answer this question in writing: *"A lead says they are interested in selling their home but won't be ready for 6 months. How do you categorize this lead and what do you do next?"*



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



---



**We are a small, fast-moving team. We value accuracy, reliability, and honesty above all else. If that describes you, we'd love to hear from you.**

title: GHL Specialist
description:
Milkyway Is Hiring

Are you the systems-driven GHL Specialist we’re looking for?



Are you highly organised, technically confident on Go High Level, and obsessed with building systems that just work? Do you love automation, clean CRM setups, and optimising funnels and workflows so businesses can scale without chaos?

If you’re someone who enjoys turning complexity into clarity and wants to play a key role in how a growing digital agency operates, this could be the perfect role for you.



Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and performance marketing. Behind every great campaign is a strong system — and that’s where you come in.

We’re growing quickly and are now looking for a dedicated GHL (GoHighLevel) Specialist to join our team.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal person wants to grow with us, take ownership of systems, and build scalable automation that supports real business outcomes.



You are:

Highly experienced with GoHighLevel (GHL). (Do not apply if you are a beginner on GHL)



Confident building workflows, automations, funnels, campaigns, and dashboards.



Experienced in creating agents inside the GHL ecosystem and using AI features.



Exceptionally organised and detail-oriented.



Comfortable troubleshooting system, automation, and data issues.



Process-driven and able to think logically about customer journeys.



Proactive in identifying inefficiencies and improving systems.



Calm under pressure and solutions-focused.



A clear communicator who can explain systems in simple terms.



Accountable, reliable, and committed to high-quality execution.



A fast learner who stays up to date with platform updates and best practices.



If you love automation, clean setups, and making systems more efficient, you’ll thrive in this role.





ABOUT THE ROLE

The GHL Specialist reports directly to the CEO and works closely with the wider team to support marketing, sales, and client delivery.



You will:

Build, manage, and optimise CRM setups inside GoHighLevel.



Create and maintain workflows, triggers, and automations.



Build and manage SMS and
 campaigns.



Create and optimise funnels and landing pages within GHL.



Manage integrations between GHL and third-party tools.



Monitor system performance and troubleshoot issues.



Maintain accurate pipelines, contact data, and reporting dashboards.



Create GHL AI agents and AI voice agents



Support onboarding of new clients into GHL systems.



Document processes and ensure systems are scalable and repeatable.



Creating snapshots of the validated processes.





This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone working within or close to Australian business hours.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be an integral part of a growing agency. It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET WHEN YOU JOIN MILKYWAY

A supportive, growth-focused environment where your systems expertise makes a real impact.

You’ll enjoy:

A collaborative and professional team culture.





Clear expectations and ownership over systems and automation.





Training and onboarding to align with our processes and standards.





Opportunities to deepen your expertise in automation and CRM strategy.





Exposure to a wide range of client accounts and use cases.





Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work.





We believe strong systems are the foundation of sustainable growth — for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like a strong fit for you, we’d love to hear from you.

Click the link to apply and include the phrase “Startdust” in the final section of the application form so we know you read this in full.

If you know someone who would be a great fit, please pass this opportunity on.

We look forward to meeting the GHL Specialist who will help power the systems behind our growth.

title: Video Editor & Social Media Publisher — Project-Based (March 2025)
description:
Video Editor & Social Media Publisher — Project-Based (March 2025)

Hera Digital | Remote (Philippines) | One-Time Project | $250 USD Fixed





About Us



Hera Digital is an Australian B2B sales automation agency that helps software and service companies build predictable revenue systems using AI. We're a lean, fast-moving team and we take our brand seriously — clean, sharp, and results-driven in everything we put out.



---



What We Need



We're looking for a talented video editor based in the Philippines for a **one-month project in March 2025**. You'll edit and publish **8 short-form social media reels** for our brand across our social platforms.



This is a fixed-price, project-based role to start. **We are actively looking to build a long-term relationship with the right editor.** If the quality of your work is excellent and you're a reliable communicator, we want to bring you on as our go-to video editor on an ongoing monthly retainer beyond March. Think of this project as a paid trial — we want it to be the start of something, not a one-off.



---



Your Responsibilities



- Edit 8 engaging short-form reels (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok-style) from raw footage and/or assets we provide

- Follow our brand identity guide closely — we will share this with you on day one (colours, fonts, tone, style)

- Add captions, lower thirds, motion graphics, and on-brand text overlays to every reel

- Apply colour grading consistent with our brand aesthetic (clean, dark, professional)

- Source and clear licensed background music appropriate to each video (Artlist or Epidemic Sound preferred)

- Schedule and publish all 8 reels to our social platforms via our **Buffer account** (we will provide access)

- Communicate progress, share drafts for feedback, and action revisions promptly via **Slack**

- Deliver all final files organised and named clearly in a shared folder (Google Drive)



---



What We're Looking For



- **Proven short-form video editing experience** — portfolio or reel examples are required to be considered

- Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

- Strong eye for pacing, typography, and on-screen text — you understand what makes a reel stop the scroll

- Experience publishing content via **Buffer** or similar scheduling tools

- Comfortable working independently with clear briefs — we don't micromanage, but we do have high standards

- Responsive communicator on **Slack** during project window

- Good written English for caption copywriting if needed



---



Project Details



**Deliverables** | 8 edited + published reels |

**Budget** | $250 USD (fixed, project total) |

**Timeline** | March 2025 only |

**Comms** | Slack |

**Publishing tool** | Buffer (access provided) |

**Files** | Google Drive |

**Long-term potential** | Monthly retainer for the right candidate |



---



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application — applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed:



1. A link to your portfolio or at least 3 examples of short-form reels you have edited

2. The tools and software you use

3. Confirmation you are comfortable using Buffer to schedule and publish content

4. Your availability in March 2025

5. A brief note (2–3 sentences) on why you're a good fit for this project



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 3+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Remote Business Development – Fintech / Payment (Flexible Hours)
description:
Remote Payment BD Associate – Commission + Growth Role



Flexible Remote Opportunity (Full-time or Part-time)



We are expanding our 2026 merchant acquisition team and looking for motivated individuals who can help introduce potential merchants to our payment platform.



About Us



We are a cross-border payment solutions provider serving digital merchants across:



• Indonesia

• India



Our clients include:



• Online gaming platforms

• Forex & trading companies

• High-frequency digital businesses



Our mission is to help merchants integrate local payment methods and scale their global operations.



Role Overview



As a Remote Payment BD Associate, your role is to help identify and introduce merchants that may benefit from our payment infrastructure.



Key responsibilities include:



• Research potential merchants and platforms

• Connect with decision makers

• Present our payment solution at a high level

• Introduce interested merchants to our team

• Assist during early-stage communication and API onboarding

• Support merchants through the test transaction stage



You will work closely with our internal team once a merchant shows interest.



What You Are NOT Responsible For



BD associates are not required to:



• Sign contracts

• Approve special pricing

• Make final commercial decisions



All contracts and final pricing approvals are handled by the company.



What Counts as a Successful Merchant



A merchant is considered successfully onboarded when:



• A decision maker is identified

• The merchant agrees to explore cooperation

• API onboarding is completed

• At least one successful test transaction is processed



This API test stage is the main milestone for BD performance.



Trial Period (2 Weeks)



All new BD associates begin with a 2-week trial period.



To successfully complete the trial, you must:



• Onboard at least one merchant to API test stage



Trial Completion Reward:



USD $200



(This is paid when the minimum requirement is met.)



After Passing Trial



Monthly Base Compensation:



USD $400



Important:



The base compensation is performance-conditional.



To qualify for the base each month:



• At least 1 merchant must reach test stage



Commission Structure



BD associates will also receive:



0.02% commission on transaction volume



Fro
rchants they introduce.



Commission terms:



• Valid for 6 months per merchant

• Calculated monthly

• No commission cap



High-volume merchants can generate significant recurring income.



Example Earnings



If a merchant processes:



Daily volume: USD 150,000

Monthly volume: USD 4.5M



0.02% commission = USD 900 per month



Multiple merchants = scalable earnings.



Work Structure



This role offers:



• Remote work

• Flexible schedule

• Full-time or part-time options



Performance matters more than working hours.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has experience in business development or lead generation

• Is comfortable initiating business conversations

• Has strong research skills

• Is proactive and disciplined

• Is familiar with
, WhatsApp, and online outreach



Experience in fintech, gaming, or trading industries is a plus.



Application Process



To apply, please answer the following questions:



1?? Have you worked in business development or lead generation before?



2?? How would you approach a gaming or forex merchant?



3?? Are you comfortable working with performance-based compensation?



4?? Can you complete a short research task within 48 hours?



Applications without answers may not be reviewed.

title: Insurance Sales Support – Cold Calling & Lead Qualification
description:
About Us:

Starkey Insurance Group is an independent insurance agency that works with multiple carriers to provide clients with the best coverage and value. We are looking for a motivated cold caller to connect with prospects and set appointments for our agents.



Position Overview:

We are seeking a part-time Virtual Cold Calling Specialist with excellent spoken English and a professional phone presence. The ideal candidate is confident making a high volume of calls each day, has experience in appointment setting or telemarketing, and preferably has prior insurance experience.



Responsibilities:

 • Make outbound calls to prospects from provided lead lists (Cole X-Dates, Leads Campus, etc.)

 • Introduce Starkey Insurance Group and confirm interest in an insurance quote

 • Qualify leads by gathering basic information and verifying details

 • Set appointments for licensed agents or transfer live calls when applicable

 • Accurately update GoHighLevel CRM with call notes and lead status

title: AI Avatar Video Specialist (Hyper-Realistic Advertising Content)
description:
**Location:** Remote

**Type:** Freelance / Contract (Potential for Ongoing Work)



**Overview**



We are looking for a highly skilled AI Avatar Video Specialist who can create **hyper-realistic AI avatar videos** for paid advertising. These will be used primarily for **short-form ads, reels, talking-head videos, and social media campaigns**.



This role is **not for beginners or general AI video users**. We are specifically looking for someone who can produce **near-indistinguishable AI human avatars** with **perfect lip sync, natural facial movement, realistic body motion, and cinematic-quality output** suitable for high-performing paid ads.



If your work looks obviously AI-generated or basic, this role is **not the right fit**.



---



**What You’ll Be Responsible For**



* Creating **hyper-realistic AI avatar videos** designed for paid advertising

* Producing **talking-head style ad creatives** for platforms like Instagram, TikTok,
 and YouTube

* Ensuring **flawless lip sync accuracy** between audio and avatar speech

* Generating **natural facial expressions, eye movement, and body motion**

* Producing content **quickly and consistently** for ongoing ad testing

* Editing and refining outputs to ensure **high realism and professional quality**

* Adapting avatars to different scripts, tones, and campaign styles

* Delivering **short-form video content (10–60 seconds)** optimized for social platforms

* Maintaining **high production standards across large volumes of content**



---



**Required Skills & Experience**



* Proven experience creating **hyper-realistic AI avatar videos**

* Strong understanding of **AI video generation tools and workflows**

* Ability to produce avatars that are **extremely difficult to distinguish from real humans**

* Advanced skill with **lip syncing, facial animation, and natural motion**

* Experience producing **content for paid social advertising**

* Fast turnaround times and ability to deliver **multiple creatives per week**

* Strong attention to detail and ability to refine outputs for realism

* Comfortable working with **scripts and direct response style advertising**



---



**Examples of Tools (or Similar)**



You should already be experienced with advanced AI video tools such as:



* HeyGen

* Synthesia

* D-ID

* Runway

* ElevenLabs (voice)

* Other advanced avatar or generative video tools



Experience combining **multiple tools to improve realism** is a strong advantage.



---



**What We’re Looking For**



* Someone who specialises in **AI avatar realism**

* Someone who understands **paid ad creative performance**

* Someone who can produce **high-quality content at scale**

* Someone proactive who can **experiment and iterate quickly**



---



**Application Requirements**



To apply, please include:



1. **Portfolio of AI avatar videos you have created**

2. Examples of **hyper-realistic talking-head style content**

3. Details of **tools and workflow you use**

4. Your **typical turnaround time per video**



Applications **without strong examples of hyper-realistic AI avatars will not be considered.**



Send application to:

title: YouTube video editor for multiple faceless channels
description:
We own a media company specialising in long-form faceless YouTube content.



We are looking for multiple video editors to complete videos for multiple channels we own, the ideal editor would be:



-Experienced in long-form faceless video creating and editing

-Able to follow instructions

-Able to learn from

-Able to watch another video's style and replicate it.



We do not just need someone who can cut clips together and make slideshow videos. We are looking for someone who understands how to make a video feel cohesive, premium, and engaging from start to finish.



The ideal candidate would be able to handle 1 video every 2 days, potentially 1 per day if possible. Our videos are 20-30 minutes long, and we have a constant flow of videos that are available for the staff members, so you can make as much money as you would like to with us.



Our Team Values

- We care deeply about the people we work with. Our core values are:

- Honesty

- Transparency

- Strong work ethic

- Ambition

- High standards



We want to build a team where talented people can grow, earn well, and stay with us long-term.



We have given out bonuses for well performing videos before, so this is completely fine with us to do again. We want to make you happy, as we understand when staff are happy, it transforms into our channels performance.



The pay will be $1 per minute, however on more complex jobs, we will negotiate this. You will be paid every Friday.



You will be required to create a 2 minute test video where we will assess your editing, this is non-negotiable due to previous candidates wasting our time.

/Instagram) and Google Ads campaigns.

title: Sales Operations Manager
description:
Location: Remote

Department: Sales Operations

Reports To: Executive Leadership

Pay: TBD | Part time 





Role Overview



The Sales Operations Manager owns all sales-facing systems across MID Construction Group, including the CRM, sales dialer, pipeline structure, automation layers, and reporting. This role enforces strict CRM adherence and ensures all processes function uniformly across organizations. The position also owns data upload and data ingestion into sales systems, ensuring accurate, compliant, and standardized imports. Additionally, the Sales Operations Manager contributes to the company’s data strategy, defining how sales data is structured, mapped, and maintained to support growth.

Administer and optimize the CRM, sales dialer, and all sales engagement technologies.

Manage all data uploads, imports, and ingestion workflows into the CRM and related systems.



Define and maintain standardized data mapping, field structures, and object relationships.



Contribute to the company’s data strategy by aligning sales system architecture with broader data governance.



Coordinate with Sales Managers to ensure systems support pipeline health, activity tracking, and forecasting.



Oversee lead routing, automation, scorecards, permissioning, and workflow logic.



Maintain a complete system and process documentation library.

Qualifications



3–5 years in sales operations, CRM administration, or revenue systems management.



Strong expertise in CRM configuration, field mapping, permissioning, and automation.



Experience managing data uploads/imports at scale.

This is not a basic VA role. You will be responsible for building, optimising, and maintaining GoHighLevel to its maximum capability, turning it into the backbone of our marketing, sales, and client communication systems.

title: AI Training & Video Course Content Producer (Real Estate)
description:
Hudson Digs Realty is seeking a Video Training & Education Producer to help build a comprehensive internal training academy for our growing real estate brokerage. This role will focus on transforming our SOPs, internal systems, and industry knowledge into high-quality Hudson Digs branded video training content for agents ranging from brand new licensees to experienced producers (Level 0–100). The ideal candidate will be able to convert written procedures into clear, engaging training modules; produce professional screen-recorded tutorials and educational videos; and create structured courses covering topics such as prospecting, lead conversion, CRM management, buyer and listing processes, and transaction workflows. Familiarity with Zillow Premier Agent, Lofty CRM, and Dotloop is strongly preferred, as this role will include producing step-by-step system tutorials and best-practice training for agents. The position also requires the ability to review YouTube or other industry training content, write original Hudson Digs scripts based on the concepts, and produce fully branded internal training videos tailored to our brokerage’s processes and systems. This is a long-term position that will continue evolving as Hudson Digs expands, helping us build a scalable training library and education platform designed to develop highly skilled, high-performing real estate agents. 



REAL ESTATE TRAINING EXPERIERNCE REQUIRED

title: TikTok Shop Affiliate Marketing Coordinator
description:
About HashStash:



HashStash is a premium eCommerce brand in the cannabis accessories space. We design and deliver high-quality products that elevate our customers’ everyday rituals. As we expand into TikTok Shop, we’re building out an affiliate marketing channel to drive performance and visibility. We’re looking for someone who’s not just an executor but a builder ready to roll up their sleeves and create systems while delivering results.



About the Role:



This is a full-time remote position. You’ll manage and grow our TikTok Shop affiliate program from scratch: sourcing and filtering creators, coordinating samples, tracking performance, and gathering usable content.



We don’t have all the systems in place yet. You’ll be helping create structure while executing in real time. The right candidate can balance doing the work today with designing a repeatable process for tomorrow.



What You'll Do:



Affiliate Outreach & Evaluation:



- Use Euka to send and manage automated messages to TikTok creators.



- Vet creator responses to identify promising affiliates based on audience, engagement, content style, and brand fit.



- Maintain a running list of prospects and update their status based on interaction.



Onboarding & Product Seeding:



- Ensure chosen affiliates complete our onboarding form and meet requirements.



- Coordinate the shipment of sample boxes and track delivery.



- Provide clear guidelines to each affiliate on expectations and content needs.



Communication & Creator Management:



- Act as the day-to-day point of contact for all affiliate creators.



- Keep communication professional, proactive, and aligned with deadlines.



- Flag misalignments or underperformance early and adjust accordingly.



Tracking & Reporting:



- Build simple systems (spreadsheets or dashboards) to track affiliate status, content delivery, and performance metrics.



- Share weekly summaries with the team: who posted, what worked, what needs attention.



- Identify trends and opportunities to improve the quality and ROI of affiliate relationships.



Content Collection & Organization:



- Gather all content generated by affiliates.



- Organize and tag assets for easy reference by the marketing team.



- Call out standout content that can be reused for ads,
, or organic channels.



You’re a Great Fit If You:



- Have experience in affiliate or influencer marketing, ideally with TikTok creators.



- Know how to spot talent—you can distinguish good content from content that converts.



- Are a strong communicator who can manage dozens of creators at once without dropping balls.



- Are comfortable in unstructured environments and can create order from scratch.



- Take ownership and move quickly without waiting for permission.



- Are organized enough to track dozens of moving parts, but flexible enough to adjust as things evolve.



Nice to Have (Not Required):



- Familiarity with Euka or similar automation tools.



- Background in working with early-stage DTC brands or start-up environments.



- Understanding of affiliate workflows inside TikTok Shop.



Schedule & Expectations



- This is a full time remote position.



- You must be available during standard business hours and work consistently each day.



Compensation



- Competitive wage based on experience.



- Potential performance-based bonuses tied to creator performance and affiliate sales.

title: Real Estate Financial Analyst
description: Hudson Digs Realty and its affiliated investment entities are seeking a high-level Real Estate Financial Analyst to support acquisitions, development projects, and portfolio management across residential and commercial real estate assets. The ideal candidate will be highly proficient in real estate financial modeling, underwriting, market research, and development analysis, including reviewing zoning maps, evaluating highest and best use scenarios, and interpreting local rent control ordinances and housing regulations. Responsibilities include building detailed investment models and pro formas, preparing offering memorandums, conducting market and regulatory research, producing monthly asset-level financial reporting, closing the books each month, and preparing annual budgets and financial forecasts for individual properties and portfolio-level rollups. Candidates must have strong Excel modeling skills, experience analyzing real estate investments and development opportunities, and a deep understanding of local market dynamics. Final candidates will be required to complete a financial modeling skills test and present sample work product via shared screen, demonstrating their analytical process and prior underwriting or financial modeling experience. This role is intended for a serious, experienced real estate analyst capable of supporting real-world investment and development decisions.
salary: $6-11 USD per hour ( based on exp)

Growth

Strategic execution

Scaling HashStash into a household name in Cannabis Culture

Automated

Systemized

 inboxes

Check in with tea
mbers to ensure progress

Speed – You execute quickly and with urgency.

Growth – You seek feedback and improve systems.

Moving the Needle – You prioritize high-impact tasks.

Innovation – You suggest better processes without being asked.

title: Wordpress / Website Development and long term SEO
description:
About Us

We are an Australian company operating several brands in the printing, motorsport apparel, and custo
rchandise industry. We are looking for a talented WordPress developer and website manager to help build, maintain, and grow our online presence across multiple brands.

This is a long-term role where you will be responsible not only for development, but also for ongoing site management, content creation, SEO optimisation, and marketing support.

Our brands include:

Promoplex – A printing and merchandise company specialising in custom apparel, signage and promotional products.

Gridlock Racewear – A motorsport apparel brand selling racing suits, racewear and tea
rchandise through an ecommerce store.

DTF Alliance – A Direct-to-Film printing supply company providing equipment, inks, film and consumables. This site already has some development completed.

________________________________________

Projects

You will be responsible for managing and developing three WordPress websites:

1. Promoplex

• Business website with company information

• Product catalogues and service pages

• Lead generation and contact forms

• Content and SEO optimisation

2. Gridlock Racewear

• Full ecommerce store (WooCommerce)

• Product pages and collections

• Motorsport brand styling and design

• Conversion optimisation

3. DTF Alliance

• Existing WordPress site partially completed

• Includes a batch sheet builder plugin for custom print sheet creation

• Product pages and educational content

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Develop and manage WordPress websites

• Design and build pages using modern WordPress builders (Elementor preferred)

• Write website copy and product descriptions

• Create graphics and visual content for pages when required

• Upload products and manage catalogues

• Implement SEO best practices (technical SEO, on-page SEO, schema etc.)

• Optimise site performance and speed

• Manage updates, backups and site security

• Setup and manage Google Ads and Meta ads when required

• Improve website conversion rates and user experience

• Ongoing improvements and feature development

________________________________________

Required Skills

• Strong experience with WordPress

• Experience with WooCommerce ecommerce stores

• Experience with Elementor or similar page builders

• Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Photoshop or similar)

• SEO knowledge and optimisation experience

• Ability to write clear and engaging website copy

• Understanding of Google Analytics, Google Search Console and marketing tools

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects

________________________________________

Nice to Have

• Experience with product catalogue websites

• Experience with printing, apparel or ecommerce industries

• Experience with conversion optimisation

• Experience with automation tools and integrations

________________________________________

What We Offer

• Long-term remote role

• Work across multiple brands and projects

• Opportunity to grow with the company

• Flexible working environment

________________________________________

To Apply

Please include the following:

1. Links to WordPress websites you have built

2. Examples of ecommerce stores you have developed

3. Examples of SEO results you have achieved

4. Your monthly salary expectation

title: Looking for VSL Video Editor for Fast Growing eCommerce Brand
description:
Hey there,



My team and I are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor specialized in VSLs and Mini-VSLs to join our fast-growing eCommerce company.



We are building a creative team focused on high-converting video sales letters (VSLs) and performance marketing creatives.



This is not just a typical editing role.



This is a creative performance role where your work directly impacts the growth of the company.



We primarily advertise to older audiences (50–70 years old) in Western markets.



Because of this, our style is story-driven, structured, and persuasive — not fast TikTok-style editing.



We are looking for someone who understands direct response marketing and can turn scripts and angles into compelling VSL-style video ads.



You will work closely with the CEO and the creative team to build powerful ads that convert.



---



ROLE



Your main responsibility will be editing VSLs and Mini-VSLs for performance marketing.



These videos will be used for:

-
 & Instagram ads

- Advertorial funnels

- Direct response campaigns



You will take scripts, angles, and concepts and turn them into high-converting video ads using strong storytelling and pacing.



---



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Edit VSLs and Mini-VSLs for performance marketing

- Turn scripts into engaging video stories

- Source and structure B-roll to support the narrative

- Use AI tools to generate visuals and clips when needed

- Improve pacing, emotion, and clarity in videos

- Create multiple variations of ads for testing

- Collaborate with the creative team to improve concepts



---



REQUIREMENTS



You MUST:

- Have experience editing direct response VSLs or video ads

- Understand basic direct response principles (hooks, storytelling, problem ? solution, testimonials, authority angles)

- Be comfortable working with AI creative tools



Experience with tools like:

- Higgsfield, NanoBanana Pro or similar image generation tools

- Video generation models such as Veo3, Kling, or Sora



You should also:

- Be able to work independently

- Have a reliable laptop or computer setup

- Have fast and stable internet

- Be fluent in English



---



BIG PLUS



- Experience creating VSLs for ads or funnels

- Understanding of performance marketing creatives

- Ability to suggest new creative angles

- Strong storytelling intuition



---



RESULTS WE EXPECT



- 4–6 high quality VSL / Mini-VSL ads per week

- Strong hooks and storytelling structure

- Continuous improvement in editing quality

- Your own ideas for improvements

- Clear communication with the creative team



---



COMPENSATION



- Starting rate: $6/hour

- 2-week paid trial period

- Performance bonuses for winning ads/edits (up to $250 for editing winning ad)

- Pay increases over time based on performance

- Opportunity to grow into a long-term part-time or full-time position



We are building a long-term creative team, not just hiring freelancers.



---



IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY



When applying, please include:

1. Examples of your best VSLs or video ads

2. Tell us if you have experience with Higgsfield or image generation models

3. Tell us if you have used video generation models like Veo3, Kling, or Sora

4. Explain shortly what makes a VSL convert

5. If you read the whole job post, include the word “VSL” at THE END of your application



Applications that do not follow these instructions WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



---



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us and contribute creatively, not just edit clips.



If you are disciplined, creative, and passionate about performance marketing, this could become a strong long-term opportunity.



Looking forward to your application.



—



Kacper Jegier

CEO, KJ ECOMMERCE LIMITED

s

title: Experienced Cold Caller – Real Estate (Script + Training)
description:
About the Job

We are looking for a reliable cold caller to contact property owners and ask if they may be interested in selling their property.

This position also involves recording short phone scripts for use in calling campaigns. 



We are currently seeking a female voice for this recording project to match the tone and style of our existing audio materials.



You will follow a structured script and collect basic information from interested sellers. Training will be provided.

This position begins with a 30-day trial period and may become a long-term opportunity based on business growth.



We value consistency, professionalism, and clear communication.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Call property owners using a provided call list

• Follow a structured script when speaking with property owners

• Ask basic questions when the owner shows interest

• Determine whether the owner may be open to selling their property

• Record call results accurately in the CRM system

Calling tools such as CallTools, BatchDialer, or similar CRM systems will be used.

________________________________________

Requirements

• Clear and easy-to-understand English speaking ability

• Comfortable making outbound cold calls

• Ability to handle rejection professionally

• Ability to follow instructions and scripts closely

• Reliable and consistent work habits

• Strong listening and communication skills

• Quiet workspace and stable internet connection

• USB headset required

________________________________________

Schedule

• 3–4 days per week

• 4 hours per day

• Total: 12–16 hours per week

Calling hours will fall between:

10:00 AM – 8:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time

________________________________________

Pay

$3 per hour

________________________________________

Training

Training and scripts will be provided before starting calls.

________________________________________

Application Instructions/Script to Read

To apply, please record the script below on https://vocaroo.com or another means and send it to us preferably by a link. If not by a link you can send it by a download.

 

Script to record:

Hi. We are interested in purchasing the property at 1389 Thomas Ave. in Montgomery. Would you be interested in selling the property now or at a later point in time?



Just to verify are you the property owner?



I want to ask you a few questions. It will only take a minute.

Overall, would you say the property is in good shape, fair condition, or needs some work?” 



Is the property occupied or vacant?



What’s prompting you to consider selling?



I'm going to have the buyer Lee directly give you a call. When is a good time to reach you?



Okay. Thanks. It was nice talking to you. Bye. (or you can say whatever closing you want to do that feels natural to you.)

title: Operations Lead — Elite Career Advisory (UK-Based)
description:
Elite Careers Strategy (ECS) is a premium career advisory helping students and professionals secure positions at the world’s elite corporate careers. 



We have:

 ? 153+ documented client outcomes

 ? Founder who has taught at Harvard Business School, Yale, and MIT

 ? 2,800+ member community

 ? Six trademarked career frameworks

 ? Growing social media presence (TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, LinkedIn)



We are looking for an Operations Lead to run the day-to-day operations so our founder can focus on content creation and premium client delivery.

This is not a task-following VA role. You will be the operational backbone of the business — managing content shipping, lead response, client onboarding, and team coordination.



THE ROLE

You will be the founder’s right hand. Everything operational flows through you.

Content Shipping (Priority #1)

 ? Receive edited videos from our video editor

 ? Quality check all content before posting

 ? Schedule and post content via GoHighLevel to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn

 ? Ensure weekly targets are hit: 1 YouTube + 5 TikToks + 5 Reels + 3 LinkedIn posts

 ? Chase the video editor if deliverables are late

Lead Response

 ? Respond to all inbound leads within 2 hours (DMs,
s, enquiries)

 ? Qualify leads and schedule calls with founder

 ? Follow up with non-responders

 ? Update CRM pipeline in GoHighLevel

Client Onboarding

 ? Send contracts and process payments via Pensight

 ? Set up client folders and welcome materials

 ? Schedule first sessions

 ? Collect testimonials after client wins

Calendar & Inbox Management

 ? Manage founder’s calendar

 ? Protect deep work and filming blocks

 ? Triage
 and draft responses

 ? Flag urgent items

Community Management

 ? Moderate Skool community (2,800+ members)

 ? Welcome new members

 ? Answer basic questions

 ? Flag complex questions for founder

Team Coordination

 ? Coordinate with video editor and 2 interns

 ? Assign tasks, set deadlines, review work

 ? You are the hub — everyone reports through you operationally



DAILY RHYTHM

 ? First thing: Check all inboxes. Respond to urgent items. Flag for founder.

 ? Morning: Respond to leads. Schedule calls. Update CRM.

 ? Midday: Content shipping. Coordinate with editor. Post via GHL.

 ? Afternoon: Community management. Client admin. Team coordination.

 ? End of day: Send daily update to founder.



WEEKLY TARGETS

 ? Lead response time: Under 2 hours

 ? YouTube posted: 1 per week

 ? TikToks posted: 5 per week

 ? Instagram Reels posted: 5 per week

 ? LinkedIn posts: 3 per week

 ? Daily updates sent: 5 per week

 ? Zero inbox: Daily



REQUIREMENTS

Must Have:

 ? 3+ years experience as VA, EA, Operations Manager, or Project Manager

 ? Experience with GoHighLevel OR similar CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

 ? Experience scheduling/posting content to social media

 ? Excellent written English (you will communicate with UK clients)

 ? Proactive communicator — flags problems before they escalate

 ? Detail-oriented — nothing falls through the cracks

 ? Comfortable managing a small team (editor + interns)

 ? Available for at least 4 hours overlap with UK timezone (GMT/BST)

Nice to Have:

 ? Experience in coaching, education, or professional services business

 ? Experience with Skool community platform

 ? Experience with Pensight or similar booking/payment tools

 ? Basic video editing skills (backup for editor)

 ? Experience working with founder-led businesses

Tech Stack:

 ? GoHighLevel (CRM + content scheduling)

 ? Pensight (payments/booking)

 ? Skool (community)

 ? Google Workspace (Drive, Calendar,
)

 ? TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn (posting)



WHO YOU ARE

 ? You take ownership. You don’t wait to be told what to do.

 ? You communicate proactively. If something is stuck, you say so immediately.

 ? You are reliable. When you say something will be done, it gets done.

 ? You are detail-oriented. You catch mistakes before they go out.

 ? You can manage others. You’re comfortable assigning tasks and holding people accountable.

 ? You want to grow. This role can become COO as the business scales.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

In 30 Days:

 ? Content shipping at full rhythm

 ? All leads responded within 2 hours

 ? Daily updates flowing

 ? Founder has zero admin tasks

In 90 Days:

 ? Business running smoothly without founder in operations

 ? 10+ new testimonials captured

 ? First £100K quarter achieved

In 12 Months:

 ? £500K+ revenue

 ? Team grown to 6-8 people reporting to you

 ? You promoted to COO



HOW TO APPLY

Please include in your application:

 1. A brief introduction (2-3 sentences about you)

 2. Your experience with CRM tools (specifically which ones)

 3. Your experience with social media scheduling/posting

 4. Your experience managing a team (even if small)

 5. Your available hours and timezone

 6. Your expected salary in USD/month

Bonus: Record a 60-second video introducing yourself. This is not required but will put you at the top of the list.



We will respond to qualified candidates within 48 hours.

Please contact us directly

title: B2B Appointment Setter & Lead Researcher – US Business Consulting
description:
About the Role

We are a US-based business consulting firm helping organizations reduce operational expenses.  

We are looking for a driven, articulate, and organized part-time VA to support our business development through prospect research and outbound appointment setting. You will work directly with the business owner in a focused, low-volume, high-quality outreach environment. This is not a high-volume call center role - quality and professionalism matter more than quantity here.



What You'll Do

On research days (2-3x per week):



Use CRM identify qualified prospects across our target industries

Find and verify decision-maker names, titles, phone numbers, and
s

Log all prospects with full details



On outreach days (2-3x per week):



Make outbound calls to US-based decision-makers 

Leave professional voi
s and follow up 

Set qualified appointments on behalf of the business owner

Document all activity, outcomes, and next steps in the daily activity log





Requirements (Must-Have)



Clear, neutral, or American-sounding English accent – this is essential for this role

US BPO or US-account call center experience strongly preferred

Proven experience cold calling US businesses

Demonstrated B2B appointment setting experience

Highly organized with strong attention to detail in documentation





Performance Goal

The primary success metric is booked appointments with qualified decision-makers. We are targeting at least 1 appointment set every 2 weeks.



To Apply

Please submit:



Your resume

A voice clip (2-3 minutes) where you:

Describe your cold calling experience with US businesses

Give a 30-second example of how you would introduce yourself to a prospect on the phone







Applications without a voice clip will not be considered.



This is ready to post as-is. The upfront accent warning will cut low-quality applications significantly and the mock pitch in the voice clip will do the rest of the filtering for you.

Do you want to tackle the onboarding document or daily reporting template next while the post attracts candidates?

title: Creative Specialist (Video Editing & Graphic Design)
description:
Savant Marketing is the #1 marketing agency for landscapers. We’re looking for a highly creative and detail-oriented Creative Specialist who can help bring our marketing campaigns to life through high-quality video ads, graphic designs, and YouTube thumbnails.



This is an excellent role for someone who loves visual storytelling, short-form video editing, and graphic design, and wants to work with a fast-growing digital marketing agency.



Role Overview



We’re searching for a Creative Specialist who thrives in a fast-paced marketing environment and can consistently produce engaging creative assets that drive results.



This role is perfect for someone who loves:



? Editing short-form video content

? Designing high-converting ad creatives

? Creating attention-grabbing YouTube thumbnails

? Working with talking-head style videos

? Turning ideas into visually compelling marketing content



You will work closely with our marketing and media buying team to produce creative assets used in
 ads, social media content, and YouTube videos.



Key Responsibilities:



- Edit short-form video ads for
, Instagram, and other platforms.

- Create high-converting image creatives for advertising campaigns.

- Design YouTube thumbnails that attract clicks and drive engagement.

- Edit talking-head style videos by adding captions, graphics, transitions, and visual enhancements.

- Work closely with the marketing team to turn ideas into finished creatives quickly.

- Ensure all creative assets are high-quality, engaging, and optimized for performance without grammatical errors

- Organize project files and maintain efficient workflows for editing and revisions.

- Continuously improve creative output by studying top-performing ads and marketing content.



Requirements



- 1+ years experience working in an agency environment

- Strong video editing skills, especially with short-form and talking-head videos.

- Strong graphic design skills for ad creatives and thumbnails.

- Experience using Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar video editing tools.

- Experience using graphic design tools such as Photoshop, Canva, or similar software.

- Ability to create high-quality thumbnails and marketing visuals quickly.

- Strong attention to detail and commitment to high-quality work.

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a remote environment.

- Reliable internet connection and ability to collaborate with a remote team.





Work Schedule



Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (EST Time Zone)



How to Apply



If you’re passionate about video editing, graphic design, and creating content that performs, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply by sending:

• Your resume

• A portfolio of your video editing and graphic design work

• A brief note explaining why you’d be a great fit for this role.

title: Email Designer — E-Commerce Email Marketing Agency
description:
Job Title:

*
 Designer (Part-Time / Per Project) — E-Commerce
 Marketing Agency**



---



## Job Description:



We are a growing
 marketing agency based in Europe that works with e-commerce brands. We are looking for a **talented and reliable
 designer** to join our team on a **part-time / per-project basis**.



You will be designing
 campaigns and
 flows (welcome series, abandoned cart, post-purchase, etc.) for our clients using **Figma** and/or **Canva**. Our clients are mostly Shopify-based e-commerce brands, so experience with product-focused
 design is a must.



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants **consistent, ongoing work** with a growing agency. We start per-project, and as we grow, this can become a full-time position with a fixed monthly salary.



---



## What You'll Be Doing:



- Designing professional
 campaigns (promotional, seasonal, product launches)

- Designing
 flows (welcome series, abandoned cart, win-back, post-purchase)

- Following brand guidelines for each client (colors, fonts, style)

- Designing mobile-first, responsive
 layouts

- Delivering clean, organized Figma files with properly named layers

- Implementing feedback and revisions quickly (usually 1-2 rounds)



---



## Requirements:



**Must-Have:**

- 2+ years of experience in *
 design** (not just graphic design — we need someone who understands
 layout and structure)

- Strong portfolio with *
 design examples** (please include at least 5
 designs in your application)

- Proficient in **Figma** (primary tool) and **Canva**

- Understanding of *
 design best practices** (600px width, mobile responsiveness, CTA placement, web-safe fonts, image optimization)

- Experience designing for **e-commerce brands** (product
s, sale campaigns, etc.)

- Strong attention to detail — pixel-perfect designs

- Reliable internet connection and ability to communicate clearly in English

- Available to work during **European business hours** (at least 4-5 hours overlap)



**Nice-to-Have (not required, but a plus):**

- Experience with Klaviyo or Mailchimp
 builders

- Basic HTML/CSS
 knowledge

- Experience with landing page design

- Adobe Photoshop / Illustrator skills



---



## How We Work:



- All communication happens on **Slack** — fast, organized, and professional

- You will receive a **design brief** for each project with clear instructions, copy, brand assets, and references

- You deliver your design in **Figma** — we review, give feedback, and you revise

- Typical turnaround: **8 hours for a first draft**, 4 hours for revisions

- We provide **SOPs, brand guidelines, and templates** so you always know exactly what to do



---



## Compensation:



We pay **per
 design**, not hourly or monthly (to start).



| Design Type | Rate |

|------------|------|

| Standard
 campaign | $7 - $10 per design |

|
 flow (per
) | $7 - $10 per design |

| Simple banner / graphic | $3 - $5 |



**Current volume:** 15-30
s per month (growing)

**Estimated monthly earnings:** $100 - $300+ depending on volume



As our client base grows, we plan to move to a **fixed monthly salary** for the right person. We value loyalty and long-term partnerships — if you deliver great work consistently, there is room to grow with us.



---



## What We Offer:



- **Consistent, ongoing work** — not a one-time project

- **Clear briefs and SOPs** — you'll never have to guess what we need

- **Room to grow** — from per-project to part-time to full-time

- **Professional team** — organized, respectful, and easy to work with

- **Creative freedom** — we trust your design skills and welcome your input

- **On-time payments** — always paid on time via Wise (TransferWise), every 2 weeks



---



## How to Apply:



**Please include the following in your application:**



1. **Your portfolio** — must include at least 5
 designs (Behance, Dribbble, PDF, or Figma link). If you don't include
 design samples, your application will not be considered.



2. **A short introduction** — tell us about yourself, your experience with
 design, and why you'd be a great fit.



3. **Your availability** — how many hours per day/week are you available? What are your working hours?



4. **Answer this question** (to confirm you read the full job post): *"What is the standard
 width for desktop
 design?"*



**Applications without a portfolio or without answering the question above will be ignored.**



---



## About Us:



We are a small but ambitious
 marketing agency that helps e-commerce brands grow through high-converting
 campaigns and automated flows. We care about quality, reliability, and building long-term relationships — both with our clients and our tea
mbers.



If you're a skilled designer who takes pride in their work and wants to grow with a team that values your talent, we'd love to hear from you.



---



*We look forward to your application!*

title: Virtual Wholesale Sales Representative
description:
Job description:



We are urgently looking for a Wholesale Sales Representative focused on increasing sales through lead generation and cold calling in Australia typically plays a vital role in growing the business by acquiring new customers and nurturing relationships with potential clients. Their tasks can include:



Lead Generation:



Identifying and researching potential clients across industries that would benefit from the products or services.

Using tools such as LinkedIn, business directories, industry associations, and trade shows to create a list of prospective customers.



Cold Calling:



Reaching out to potential leads to introduce the company and its offerings, aiming to set up meetings or sales discussions.

Developing effective cold-calling scripts and strategies to overcome objections and engage prospects in meaningful conversations.



Sales Pitch:



Presenting products or services to potential clients, emphasizing their benefits and competitive advantages.

Tailoring sales pitches to the needs of the customers, with a deep understanding of market trends and customer pain points.



Relationship Building:



Establishing and maintaining strong relationships with key decision-makers within targeted businesses or organizations.

Following up with prospects to ensure they remain engaged and move through the sales funnel.



Tracking and Reporting:



Monitoring sales activities, maintaining a database of leads, and reporting on the progress of outreach efforts.

Providing feedback to the sales team on customer needs, market trends, and competitor strategies.



Achieving Sales Targets:



Meeting or exceeding set sales targets through continuous lead generation, cold calling, and closing deals.

Identifying cross-selling and upselling opportunities to maximize revenue.



Customer Service:



Ensuring client satisfaction through excellent customer service and support after the sale.

Addressing customer inquiries, managing issues, and coordinating with internal teams for product delivery or support.



Key Skills for this Role:



Strong communication and negotiation skills

Ability to work autonomously and meet targets

Understanding of the Australian market and its specific needs

Proficiency with CRM software and sales tools

Resilience and persistence, especially when handling cold calls or rejections



Skills & Qualifications:



- Holder of a Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or any related field

- At least 1 year of proven work experience in the Sales Support function/Marketing, specifically developing marketing campaigns in a BPO Company or International Company

- At least 1 year of cold calling, lead generation and marketing
s

- Intermediate to Advance knowledge in Graphic design through canva

- People person: excellent verbal and written communication skills and making sales

- Analytical, detailed and multitasking

- Results-oriented, organized team player

- Can work individually and in minimal supervision

- with own device (Laptop or Desktop) to use for the job

- Willing to install Hubstaff app to monitor time and productivity

title: SEO Specialist
description:
We are seeking a results-driven SEO & Backlink Specialist Virtual Assistant to help grow our online visibility, improve search rankings, and drive qualified traffic. The ideal candidate is highly analytical, organized, and experienced in keyword research, backlink strategy, and SEO reporting.



This role requires someone who understands both the technical and strategic side of SEO and can present clear, data-driven reports using spreadsheets and dashboards.



Key Responsibilities

???? Keyword Research & Strategy



Conduct in-depth keyword research using tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Ubersuggest, Google Keyword Planner, etc.



Identify high-intent, low-competition keyword opportunities



Perform competitor keyword gap analysis



Create keyword maps and content optimization plans



Track keyword rankings and search performance



???? Backlink Strategy & Outreach



Develop and execute white-hat backlink strategies



Identify high-authority backlink opportunities



Perform outreach to website owners, bloggers, and directories



Secure guest posting opportunities



Monitor backlink profile and remove toxic links



Maintain backlink tracking spreadsheets



???? Reporting & Data Analysis



Create weekly and monthly SEO performance reports



Track KPIs including:



Organic traffic



Keyword rankings



Domain authority



Backlink growth



Conversion tracking (if applicable)



Build and maintain organized spreadsheets for:



Keyword tracking



Backlink tracking



Content planning



Competitor analysis



Present data in a clear, easy-to-understand format



???? Technical & On-Page SEO Support



Optimize meta titles, descriptions, headers, and internal linking



Conduct basic site audits



Identify technical SEO issues and recommend solutions



Work with content writers to ensure SEO best practices are followed



Required Skills & Qualifications



2+ years of experience in SEO and backlink building



Proven track record of improving keyword rankings



Strong knowledge of Google Search Console & Google Analytics



Experience with SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, etc.)



Advanced proficiency in Google Sheets or Excel



Understanding of white-hat SEO best practices



Strong communication skills (written and verbal)



Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with local SEO



Experience working with service-based businesses



Familiarity with WordPress or other CMS platforms



Basic understanding of technical SEO (schema, indexing, crawl errors)



KPIs & Performance Metrics



Increase in organic traffic



Improvement in keyword rankings



Growth in high-quality backlinks



Increase in domain authority



Accurate and timely reporting



Work Structure



Remote position



Part-time or full-time (flexible based on performance)



Weekly reporting required



Monthly strategy review calls



How to Apply



Please include:



Examples of SEO reports you’ve created



A sample keyword research spreadsheet



A summary of your backlink building strategy



Case studies or results from previous clients

mber to help build and grow a professional Shopify store selling digital products for tradesmen and DIY workers.

Invoice templates

Job sheets

TikTok

Pinterest

X 
)

• Have proven experience building Shopify stores

title: AI Marketing & Social Media Manager
description:
AI Marketing & Social Media Manager (Remote – Full Time)



Company: Lightning Bult Electrical, Plumbing & Air Conditioning

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full Time – Australian business hours preferred



Lightning Bult is a fast-growing home services company based in Sydney, Australia. We provide electrical, plumbing, air conditioning and pool heating services.



We are looking for a highly organised AI-savvy Marketing & Social Media Manager to manage our digital presence across multiple platforms and help grow our brand online.



This role is ideal for someone who understands modern AI marketing tools, video content, social media automation and analytics.



Your job is to turn our photos, videos and ideas into consistent, high-quality marketing content that reaches thousands of homeowners every week.



Your Mission



Your mission is to take Lightning Bult’s real photos, videos and ideas and turn them into:



• Social media posts

• Short form videos

• Blog articles

•
 newsletters

• YouTube content



You will organise, create, schedule and publish content so our marketing runs consistently with minimal input from the business owner.



Responsibilities

title: Cold Calling Sales Closer
description:
We are growing our dog accessories division by bringing handcrafted Maasai leather beaded collars to pet lovers and retailers around the world. These collars are made by skilled Maasai artisans in Kenya, combining cultural heritage, premium leather and durable, water-resistant construction. The result is a unique, story-driven product that helps stores stand out and delight their customers.



As a Cold Calling Sales Closer, you own the entire sales cycle on the phone: from first contact with qualified leads to closing initial orders and repeat purchases. You will speak directly with pet retailers, groomers, boarding facilities and importers, present our product, handle objections and secure sales. Your income grows with your results through a monthly salary plus a commission-based structure.



What you will do

- Filter & Call qualified leads from our database and introduce our products.

- Identify quickly if the prospect is a retailer, groomer, boarding facility, vet clinic or importer, and adapt your pitch.

- Present the product clearly: benefits, premium look and in-store positioning.

- Ask targeted questions to understand their business.

- Handle objections  and turn them into opportunities.

- Close sales directly on the call.

- Follow up with warm prospects and turn interest into paid orders.

- Keep accurate notes in the CRM so nothing falls through the cracks.

- Share patterns and feedback with the team to improve scripts, offers and targeting.



We’re not looking for someone who

- Only books meetings and avoids asking for the order.

- Is uncomfortable discussing price or negotiating on the phone.

- Needs a large fixed salary and dislikes performance-based pay.

- Reads scripts word-for-word without listening or adapting.

- Avoids high outbound activity or takes rejection personally.



What’s in it for you

High earning potential through a commission-based model with uncapped upside.

A differentiated, easy-to-love product with a real story behind it.

Direct, visible impact on company growth with clear revenue attribution.

Remote-friendly setup and flexibility to organize your calling blocks.

Growth opportunities into Senior Closer, Key Account or Sales Team Lead.

Preferred experience



Must have

Accent: Clear, easily understood English with a neutral or American accent.

1–3+ years of experience in phone-based sales (telesales, outbound closing, SDR/BDR with closing responsibilities, etc.).

Proven track record of selling directly on calls, not just setting appointments.

Strong bias for action and comfort with daily activity and revenue targets.

Excellent spoken English and a clear, confident phone presence.

Strong listening and objection-handling skills; you are comfortable asking for the sale.

Comfortable with a fixed salary plus commission-based or commission-heavy pay structures.

Solid discipline in using CRM tools and following up.

Good, stable internet connection suitable for VoIP calls and remote work.

Resilience, persistence and a genuine growth mindset.



Nice to have

Experience selling to small businesses in the pet industry (retailers, groomers, vet clinics, distributors).

Experience in international sales or working across time zones.

High tech literacy with sales tools and AI assistants.

Background in sales, customer service or operations where you owned a target.



Recruitment process

Application with short Job requirements testing

Sales interview focused on your past closing experience and results.

Live cold-call simulation with feedback.

Final interview to align on commission structure, targets and ramp-up.

Reference check.

Offer.



We value real skills and real outcomes. If you are not willing to do a short live role-play or share a sample call (even anonymized), this is probably not the right role for you.

description:
