title: AI Developer – Build AI Skin Analysis System (Computer Vision / ML)
description:
AI Developer – Build AI Skin Analysis System (Computer Vision / ML)



 Job Description



We are looking for an AI Developer / Machine Learning Engineer  to help build a custom AI skin analysis system  for a technology platform in the skin health and aesthetics industry.



This system will power our upcoming platform Skin United, which connects consumers with trained skin professionals and provides intelligent skin analysis and recommendations.



The goal is to build our own AI infrastructure  rather than relying on third-party AI tools or subscription platforms.



You will work alongside our existing development team  who are building the website and app infrastructure.



The AI system will analyse facial images and skin data to identify skin concerns and support personalised skin insights.



Examples of similar platforms include:



* Haut.AI

* Renude



---



 Responsibilities



You will help design and build the AI engine for skin analysis  including:



• Image-based skin analysis using computer vision

• Detecting skin conditions such as acne, pigmentation, redness, pores, texture, and ageing indicators

• Training and improving machine learning models for skin analysis

• Working with datasets of facial images to train models

• Integrating the AI model into our existing web/app infrastructure via API

• Collaborating with our development team building the platform

• Optimising model performance and accuracy

• Helping design the AI workflow used by the platform







 Required Skills



We are looking for someone experienced in:



• Python

• Machine Learning / AI development

• Computer Vision

• Image processing

• TensorFlow or PyTorch

• OpenCV

• API development

• Working with large datasets for model training



Experience building AI analysis tools or computer vision models  is highly preferred.







# Bonus Skills (Not Required)



Experience with:



• Dermatology or skincare datasets

• AI recommendation engines

• Image segmentation models

• Mobile / web AI integration

• Cloud AI deployment



---



# How You Will Work With Us



You will collaborate with:



• Our internal development team building the platform

• Product leadership defining the AI features

• Marketing and product teams defining the user experience



The AI model will need to integrate with the platform backend via API .



---



# Working Hours



Flexible, but ideally overlapping a few hours with Indian and UK timefor collaboration with the dev team.



---



# Pay



Open depending on experience.



Please include:



• Your expected hourly rate 

• Examples of AI or machine learning projects you have built

• Your experience with computer vision or image analysis



---



# Important



We are specifically looking for someone who can build a custom AI model, not someone who only integrates existing AI APIs.



---



# How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short introduction about your AI / ML experience

2. Examples of relevant projects or GitHub repositories

3. Your hourly rate

4. Confirmation that you are comfortable working with an existing development team.

5. Explain how you would build an AI system that analyses facial images to detect skin conditions.

title: Night Shift Execution Assistant
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



OPENING STATEMENT



An Australian business is hiring a night-shift Execution Assistant to support our live racing operation. The job is straightforward: follow clear instructions, focus on the task at hand and ensure things run smoothly overnight. No betting experience is required - all training is provided.



==============================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Stable, long-term work for 3-4 nights per week to start, with the potential to take on more hours as you prove your reliability.

* Remote position - work from the comfort of your home during late-night hours.

* Paid training and support so you can learn our processes quickly.

* Clear expectations and a calm working environment.



==============================



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



* 20,000 PHP starting salary during probation.

* 23,500 PHP monthly salary + 1,500 PHP monthly benefits after successful probation.

* 13th month pay.

* 20 days paid annual leave + 10 paid sick days.

* Stable, long-term role with an Australian company.



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Watch live racing events and carry out execution tasks exactly as instructed.

* Keep track of event times and prepare for the next event while monitoring the current one.

* Keep an eye on balances and status indicators - pause or stop activity when asked.

* Record what you did and any results so we can review later.



==============================



REQUIREMENTS



* Sharp attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions precisely.

* Calm under pressure, with the ability to handle several tasks at once without getting confused.

* Comfortable working night shifts (around 10:00 pm - 4:30 am AEST) and staying focused for several hours.

* Willing to ask questions when something is not clear rather than guessing.

* Reliable internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace.



==============================



NICE TO HAVE (OPTIONAL)



* Experience in any fast-paced environment that required careful execution (e.g., trading, logistics, live events).

* Ability to write clear notes and help improve how we do things.



==============================



SCHEDULE



* Work 3-4 nights per week during Australian late-night hours (about 10:00 pm - 4:30 am AEST, sometimes later).

* A short break (about 45-60 minutes) is usually available around midnight.

* Once you demonstrate reliability, more nights may be offered.



If you enjoy execution work, are detail-oriented and are comfortable working nights, we encourage you to apply. More details about the specifics of the role will be provided during the application process.



==============================



HOW TO APPLY



* Click "APPLY FOR THIS JOB" button on this job post.

* Fill in the Subject field (this is required, but it will not affect your application outcome).

* Optionally, you may write a message.

* Click Send
.

* Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions for the hiring process.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Premiere + After Effects)
description:
ZEW Media is a growing Chicago-based content agency producing high-volume short-form content for brands, real estate teams, and founders.



We’re looking for a skilled video editor who is:



• Fast and detail-oriented

• Strong with short-form pacing and retention

• Clean with captions and typography

• Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro

• Comfortable in After Effects for subtle motion graphics

• Reliable with consistent weekly output



This role is primarily focused on short-form social content (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts), with occasional higher-end creative or long-form projects.



We are not looking for heavy transition edits or trend-based template styles. We value clean pacing, strong hooks, clarity, and subtle, professional motion design.



Responsibilities



• Edit short-form social content (30–90 seconds)

• Add clean captions and subtle motion graphics

• Repurpose long-form content into short clips

• Implement revision notes efficiently

• Maintain organized project files



Occasionally:

• Assist with YouTube edits or higher-level creative projects



Requirements



• Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

• Solid working knowledge of After Effects (text animation, lower thirds, light motion graphics)

• Basic to intermediate Photoshop skills (thumbnails, end cards, simple graphic assets)

• Understanding of retention-focused editing

• Organized workflow and file management

• Clear communication and consistent availability



Compensation



Part-time monthly contract

$1,000 – $1,500 per month (based on experience and speed)

title: Handwriting Notes (No Experience Required)
description:
Job Title: Handwriting Specialist (Authentic Handwriting Required)



Role Overview:

I am looking for a detail-oriented person to help me with a specific, high-touch direct mail project. The goal is for my mailers to look like a neighbor or a friend personally sent them.



Your Responsibilities:



Authentic Handwriting: You will be handwriting addresses on envelopes and short, personal notes on Post-it notes. I need the handwriting to be legible but look "human" (with natural variations), not like a cold, robotic machine.



Accuracy: You will be copying addresses from a provided list. Zero errors allowed.



Quality Control: You will be responsible for ensuring the placement of notes is consistent but natural.



Packaging: You will be responsible for carefully organizing and packaging these items for shipment to my office in the US.



What I Am Looking For:



Excellent Penmanship: Your handwriting must be clear, neat, and professional.



High Attention to Detail: You double-check your work so I don't have to.



Independence: You don’t need to be micro-managed. You understand that "done right" is more important than "done fast."



Reliability: You are looking for a long-term, consistent project.



Project Details:



Workflow: You will write the pieces, pack them securely, and ship them to me in Miami.



Materials: All materials will be provided or expensed.



Performance: I am looking for quality over speed. I would rather you write 20 perfect, authentic-looking envelopes per hour than 50 messy ones.



To Apply:

Please do not just send a generic cover letter. Attach a photo of a sample of your handwriting. Write the following sentence on a piece of paper and send it as a photo:

"I am interested in this handwriting project and I pay attention to the details."

title: Editor (E-commerce Brand Experience REQUIRED)
description:
Video Editor - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $3–$8+ USD Per Hour + Bonuses up to $60 per video!!



- MUST HAVE experience making ads for e-commerce brands

- Please list brands you have worked with and include work and ads that you have made :)



Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (1-4 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $60 per video depending on performance.

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

+ BONUSES!



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $3-$8 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor?



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn



How to Apply

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: Rockstar Lead Generator/New Business Prospector
description:
Background: 

Our new financial services business is looking for a rockstar to lead our new client prospecting and outreach to help us grow our business through prospecting, researching potential clients, and making initial contact and scheduling appointments. 



Job Description: 

Daily Responsibilities include

1. Finding prospective customers through multiple social media channels - youtube,
, linkedin, instagram, tiktok and contacting them to solicit interest and new business. 

2. Researching local businesses and professionals through google and other channels to find potential clients in niche markets and reaching out by
, social media, phone call or text. 

3. Use spreadsheet or CRM to track all contacts made and provide daily report.

4. Spark interest while keeping contacts brief and transitioning warm leads to advisor/customer service rep. 

5. Schedule appointments for prospects to meet with an advisor or customer service rep.

6. Follow strict rules on information able to provide - financial services are regulated and only certain details/information can be shared or gathered by unlicensed personnel. 



What we are looking for: 

1. Two years of experience in lead generation, prospecting or appointment setting. 

2.  Experienced with multiple social media platforms and using to search for contacts - linkedin, 
, youtube

3. Highly organized and detail oriented

4. Excellent written English communication skills - most client communications will be made online in written format

5. Ability to contact research and contact high volume of leads



Technical Skills:

1. Written communication

2. Prospecting

3. Appointment Setting

4. Follows instructions and guidelines extremely closely 



Basic Skills: 

In addition to having excellent English skills, you'll need to use a number of applications. 

1. Search engines like Google, IE, Bing, etc. 

2. Social Media Sites - Youtube, Linkedin,
, TikTok, Instagram

3. Microsoft Excel

4. Microsoft Word

5. Project Management software (Basecamp/Asana)

6. Microsoft Outlook

7. Gmail, Google Docs, Google Sheets

8. Communication apps like
, WhatsApp, Slack, Teams



Schedule: 

This is a full time position, 8 hours a day. Hours are somewhat flexible - day shift, swing shift or overnight can work. Needs to have at least 4 hours a day between 11PM - 10AM Manila time at least 3 week days so you can overlap some with US business hours in Pacific Time Zone. Remaining hours are flexible. We don't like to micromanage or time track, we only care about performance! 



Salary: 

$800-1,100 USD per month for full-time work (40 hours per week)



Benefits: 

After 6 months probation you will receive 

1. 13th Month Pay

2. Phil Health/HMO stipend 

3. Weekly pay for first 3 months (via Easy Pay/Payoneer). after that bi-weekly or monthly negotiable



To Apply: 

Include in the subject line "Rockstar Lead Generator - [Your Name]"



Please answer the following questions

1. Where are you in the Philippines?

2. What is your experience in sales/marketing/lead generation?

3. Why do you want to work for us?

4. What is your preferred schedule?

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Executive Virtual Assistant



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1100 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Executive Virtual Assistant to provide comprehensive support to a senior industry leader across both a consulting practice and a creative music career. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and enjoys balancing strategic business support with creative coordination.



The Executive Virtual Assistant will act as a trusted right hand, managing day-to-day operations, scheduling, communications, and project coordination. This position offers a unique opportunity to gain exposure to multifamily operations, PropTech, and consulting work, while also supporting initiatives within the music industry. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, resourceful, and comfortable handling multiple priorities with discretion and professionalism.





Consulting & Business Operations Responsibilities: 



* Social Media & Content Management: 

Manage LinkedIn content calendar following established weekly posting strategy

Schedule and publish content across platforms using Dripify and other automation tools

Monitor engagement and flag opportunities for relationship building



* Podcast Scheduling & Coordination: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for PropTech Pulse (multifamily PropTech) and Purpose Built (personal transformation) podcasts

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and pre-interview logistics

Coordinate recording schedules and send calendar invitations

Prepare guest briefing materials and episode outlines

Track episode pipeline and maintain production calendar

Coordinate podcast promotion across social channels for all shows



* Speaking & Workshop Development: 

Research and apply to speaking opportunities at industry conferences (NMHC, NAA, Apartmentalize, regional events)

Track submission deadlines, requirements, and follow-up communications

Promote and book workshops, managing logistics and attendee communications

Coordinate The Diplomat's Table quarterly executive events



* CRM & Client Nurturing: 

Maintain CRM database with accurate contact information and engagement history

Execute nurturing sequences for prospects across six LinkedIn outreach lanes

Schedule discovery calls via Calendly Professional

Prepare briefing documents for client meetings



* Administrative & Financial: 

Manage calendar and scheduling using Microsoft Outlook

Prepare and send monthly client invoices

Track accounts receivable and follow up on outstanding payments

Compile monthly business reports and KPI tracking

Handle
 correspondence and prioritize inbox



* Website & Digital Platform Management: 

Coordinate website design and development projects with designers/developers

Manage website content updates, blog posts, and landing pages

Set up and maintain virtual training platform (course uploads, user management, content organization)

Manage ecommerce platform for workshops, courses, and digital products

Monitor platform performance, troubleshoot issues, and coordinate technical support

Track enrollment, sales metrics, and customer inquiries



* Music Career Responsibilities: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for House Call music podcast

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and recording logistics for House Call

Manage social media presence and content calendar for music brand

Research and submit tracks to record labels and A&R contacts

Submit songs to playlist curators (Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)

Coordinate release promotion campaigns for new tracks

Track streaming metrics and engagement across platforms

Research marketing opportunities and music industry events





Required Qualifications:

7+ years experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or in a marketing/communications support role

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or related field preferred

Exceptional organizational skills with strong attention to detail

Proficiency with LinkedIn, social media scheduling tools, and CRM platforms

Experience with website content management systems (WordPress, Squarespace, or similar)

Familiarity with online course platforms (Thinkific, Teachable, Kajabi) and/or ecommerce tools

Strong written and verbal communication skills with professional polish

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously

Self-starter who anticipates needs, takes initiative, and operates with minimal supervision

Experience coordinating podcasts, media appearances, or content production





Preferred Qualifications:

Experience supporting executives in professional services, consulting, or thought leadership roles

Familiarity with real estate, PropTech, or B2B industries

Background in music industry marketing, artist management, or entertainment

Experience with invoicing, basic bookkeeping, or accounts receivable

Knowledge of conference speaking circuits and event promotion





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Post Production Specialist
description:
Post Production Specialist



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1000 per month



Job Overview: 



We are seeking a detail-oriented Post Production Specialist to support our growing production team, with a strong focus on quality control and the review of already edited images. This role blends technical post-production knowledge with light administrative support to ensure high-quality deliverables and efficient workflows. It is well suited for someone with experience in real estate photography and a strong appreciation for producing visually compelling content.



This position is ideal for a candidate with a solid understanding of the post-production workflow, a sharp eye for detail, and a genuine passion for quality assurance. As a collaborative, team-facing role, excellent English communication skills and the ability to build strong, professional working relationships are essential.



Key Responsibilities:

Review and quality-check edited images to ensure accuracy, consistency, and adherence to production standards.

Identify errors, inconsistencies, or areas for improvement and provide clear, constructive feedback.

Ensure final outputs meet established quality benchmarks before delivery.

Collaborate closely with editors and internal tea
mbers to maintain workflow efficiency.

Communicate clearly and professionally to support alignment across the team.

Maintain organized records of revisions, feedback, and approvals.

Contribute ideas and suggestions to improve post-production and QC processes.



Qualifications: 

Solid understanding of the image editing and post-production process.

Strong attention to detail and a passion for quality control.

Ability to collaborate effectively in a remote, team-based environment.

Confident in providing feedback in a professional and constructive manner.

Highly organized, reliable, and responsible.

Exceptional attention to detail and ability to spot inconsistencies in photos.

Prior experience in post-production, image review, or quality assurance is strongly preferred.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal. 





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Content Production Coordinator & Creative Ops Project Manager
description:
# Content Production Coordinator & Creative Ops Project Manager — Newsletter, Social Content & Creative

**CORE TOOLS:** Notion, Trello, Google Workspace,
, WhatsApp, Claude, Slack 



---



## WHO WE ARE



You'll be supporting day-to-day production operations across two companies run by the same creative leadership team.



1// The first is a **fintech and financial media company** producing a biweekly newsletter, short-form social video, and editorial content. We run a documented 14-day production cycle with defined phases and gates. Within 3 months, we're scaling to weekly — then launching a second newsletter — while running 30 days of social content calendar.



2// second is a **Brooklyn-based creative studio** doing creative services like branding, websites, photo/video production, equipment rentals, and content licensing. we need to prepare  production docs like SOWs, production briefs, photo galleries.



Supporting this we have international contractor team in place: a Philippines-based VA managing newsletter production and social content coordination, a Philippines-based brand designer, a Hong Kong-based retoucher- our team communicates via
 and 
. We pay contractors via Wise.



**You are the layer that keeps all of them on track.** Briefs. Assignments. Deadlines.  



---



## THE ROLE



This is a part-time, async-first role. Hours flex between 10–15/week depending on where we are in the production cycle 



This is not too much of a "do the work" role. This is a **brief, coordinate, QA, and unblock** to get to successful outcomes role. 



The important thing is to know and set up the right systems so you know at any given 
nt: where every deliverable is in the pipeline, who owns the next action, what success looks like at that step, and whether it's on track or what is the blocker as well as whats the easiest way to resolve it - now and in the future. 



---



## WHAT YOU WILL DO



**Know the Clients. Projects and the Team**



You will coordinate a small international contractor team. to serve our firm and our clients.  You need to understand what each person does, what a brief needs to looks like for them, what turnaround to expect, and how to QA their output





**Own / Maintain the Production Process Board**



- Maintain clean Notion tickets, pages for every active newsletter cycle — all 5 phases, all 5 gates, every owner, every deadline

- When we move to two simultaneous newsletter cycles, you ensure they don't collide, every contributor knows what they're working on and when



**Run the Cycle**



- Monday kickoff: confirm topic is locked, outline is drafted, Gates 1 and 1B are cleared

- Brief each contributor for their phase as it opens — don't wait for them to ask

- Chase drafts, design assets, and revisions on schedule

- Gate-check every deliverable: does this match the brief? Is it ready to move forward?

- Own the Wednesday QA: links tested, mobile preview confirmed, test send done, publish scheduled



**Social Content Pipeline**



- Coordinate the 30-day social content calendar — brief ? draft ? revision ? approved ? scheduled ? published

- Manage video clip coordination between the VA and retoucher: file handoff, feedback relay, export approvals

- Upload finalized assets to the content library with correct naming and organization



**Brief Writing**



- Write clear, specific briefs for each contributor at each stage — the right brief means fewer revision rounds and fewer back-and-
 on
/WhatsApp

- Capture feedback from leadership and translate it into actionable direction for the team (e.g. "color grade reference attached — bring warmth up, reduce grey on subject")



**Notion Ownership & Optimization**



- Our Notion is a work in progress — functional but messy. Auditing, reorganizing, and optimizing it is a core part of this role

- Tweak and build templates that actually match how we work, not how Notion thinks we should work

- Troubleshoot broken databases, misconfigured views, and workflows that have drifted from their original intent

- Use Notion AI where it speeds things up; know its limits and when to work around them



**AI-Assisted Workflows**



- You are comfortable prompting Claude and ChatGPT to assist with drafting briefs, SOPs, status summaries, and first-pass copy — not as a crutch, but as a genuine accelerant

- You know how to write a prompt that gets a useful output, and how to edit AI output into something that actually sounds right

- You help the team work smarter by identifying where AI fits into the pipeline and where human judgment is non-negotiable



**Systems & SOPs**



- As we scale, document every new process so it's repeatable without you holding it in your head

- Flag workflow gaps and propose fixes before they become emergencies



---



## THE 3-MONTH RAMP



**Month 1:** Learn the existing 14-day cycle inside out. Own the board. Audit and begin cleaning up Notion. Know every contributor's workflow. Zero missed gates.



**Month 2:** Support the transition to weekly cadence — two cycles running simultaneously. Prove the system holds under pressure.



**Month 3:** Help stand up a second newsletter from a production ops standpoint — new board, new cycle, new contributor briefs. You help build it.



---



## WHO YOU ARE



- You have coordinated a small creative or production team before — you know what it means to brief a designer vs. brief an editor vs. brief a retoucher, and you know the difference

- You communicate with precision via
 and 
 — your messages are short, clear, and always have a next action attached

- You know the difference between a good deliverable and one that just needs to ship — and you know when to flag leadership vs. when to solve it yourself

- Notion is not intimidating to you — you have reorganized a messy workspace before and you know how to build a database that people actually use

- You use Claude and/or ChatGPT regularly and know how to prompt well — not just "write me a brief" but actually getting useful, on-brand output

- You are comfortable with fintech and financial media content — you don't need to be an expert, but you can read a newsletter about markets and know whether the right link is in the right place

- Strong written English — briefs, SOPs, and status updates are core to this role

- Proactive by nature: "Gate 3 is at risk, here's why, here's my proposed fix" is a message you send before anyone asks



**Bonus:**

- Experience coordinating with a distributed international team across time zones and platforms

- Experience with Beehiiv, social video workflows, or short-form content pipelines

- Familiarity with Wise or international contractor payment coordination

- Experience with 
c or similar content/asset libraries



---



## TO APPLY



Send a message with:



1. A specific example of a time you coordinated a small team to a deadline — who did what, how you tracked it, what broke and how you handled it

2. Your experience with Notion specifically — have you ever cleaned up or rebuilt a workspace? Tell us what it looked like before and after

3. How you use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) in your current workflow — be specific

4. Your available hours and EST timezone overlap

title: Motion Graphic Expert
description:
Project-Based / Freelance

Potential for ongoing work if the first project goes well.



OVERVIEW

I’m looking for a highly capable Motion Graphics Designer to help me build the core visual asset system for a YouTube brand.



This is not a role for someone who only drops in flashy templates.



I need someone who understands how to build a clean, premium, editorial motion graphics package that feels custom, modern, and highly usable inside a real editing workflow.



The visual direction is inspired by the style often seen in high-end YouTube documentary / explainer channels — polished, minimal, intentional, information-dense, and built with strong taste and consistency.



The goal is to create a reusable motion graphics system that I can use across future videos in Premiere Pro, with assets built in After Effects and exported as MOGRTs where appropriate.



What I Need Built



I am looking for help creating the core asset library for my editing workflow.



This will likely include:

 • Full-screen title cards

 • Section headers

 • Lower thirds

 • Name / title IDs

 • Source tags / citation tags

 • Callout labels

 • Pointer graphics

 • Highlight boxes

 • Info cards / fact cards

 • Sidebar panels

 • Numbered list builds

 • Comparison layouts

 • Big stat graphics

 • Timeline graphics

 • Screen-recording annotation graphics

 • A consistent transitions / animation style for these assets



The goal is not just to make isolated graphics.

The goal is to build a cohesive system with consistent:

 • typography

 • spacing

 • padding

 • line weights

 • corner radius

 • color usage

 • motion timing

 • easing

 • layout behavior



Software Requirements



You must be comfortable working in:

 • Adobe After Effects

 • Adobe Premiere Pro

 • Essential Graphics / MOGRT workflow



Bonus if you also understand:

 • editorial design

 • broadcast-inspired design systems

 • YouTube retention-focused editing

 • motion systems built for repeat use, not just one-off animation



What “Good” Looks Like



I am not looking for:

 • overdesigned graphics

 • overly flashy animation

 • generic corporate templates

 • loud transitions

 • cheesy YouTube effects

 • motion for motion’s sake



I am looking for:

 • clean editorial motion design

 • premium typography

 • tasteful animation

 • strong visual hierarchy

 • consistency across assets

 • motion that feels smooth and intentional

 • assets that are practical and fast to use in Premiere



Deliverables



The project will likely include:

 • an agreed-upon visual direction for the package

 • a small motion graphics system / style guide

 • After Effects project files

 • organized source files

 • exported MOGRTs for Premiere Pro

 • clearly labeled assets

 • editable controls where useful

 • clean folder organization



Ideal Candidate



You are a strong fit if you:

 • have real taste in modern motion design

 • understand the difference between “template-looking” and “designed”

 • can create a system, not just random assets

 • know how to make graphics flexible for editors

 • are detail-oriented with spacing, timing, typography, and layout

 • can follow references while still making smart design decisions

 • communicate clearly and hit deadlines



To Apply



Please send:

 1. A short intro about your experience

 2. Your portfolio or samples of motion graphics work

 3. Examples of work that feel clean, editorial, premium, or documentary/explainer style

 4. Confirmation that you can work in After Effects + Premiere Pro MOGRT workflow

 5. Your pricing structure for project-based work

 6. Your estimated turnaround time for a project like this

 7. The word “Kallaway” at the top of your application so I know you read this carefully



Important



Please do not apply if your work mainly looks like:

 • gaming edits

 • flashy promo reels

 • heavy glitch effects





I am specifically looking for someone who can help custom build a refined visual language for long-form YouTube content.



Potential for Ongoing Work



If the first project goes well, there is strong potential for additional work creating:

 • new graphics modules

 • one-off custom graphics for future videos

 • refinements to the system

 • ongoing motion support for long-form YouTube content

title: Guest Communications Virtual Assistant (Short-Term Rentals)
description:
Please only apply for this job if you are an experienced STR VA



We are seeking a highly reliable, detail-oriented, and fast-thinking Guest Relations & Operations VA to support our short-term rental portfolio. This role is essential in delivering smooth operations and exceptional guest experiences across multiple booking platforms.



You will act as the central communication hub for guests, cleaners, maintenance teams, and property owners. Because we guarantee fast service, you must be able to respond within 5 minutes during your shift and dedicate 100% focus to this role with no other work commitments.



This position requires someone who thrives in a high-pressure, fast-paced environment and can perform consistently under close supervision.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Respond to guest inquiries, booking requests, and issues on Airbnb, BdC, and Hospitable.

- Coordinate with cleaners, maintenance personnel, and homeowners to ensure all tasks are completed promptly.

- Manage, monitor, and update cleaning and maintenance schedules to keep all properties guest-ready.

- Send turnover reminders to cleaners and verify completion.

- Monitor key status via KeyNest to ensure accurate tracking and availability.

- Assist in managing TT Lock digital access for applicable properties.

- Update pricing, availability, and property settings using PriceLabs and similar tools.

- Ensure calendars remain synced across all platforms at all times.

- Check Hospitable minimum night settings to prevent unnecessary blocked dates.

- Manage communication via RingCentral, Bl
, and other channels.

- Prepare accurate homeowner monthly invoices in a timely manner.

- Use Asana for property details, processes, and guidelines.

- Use Trello for daily and weekly task management.

- Investigate issues independently, including reviewing prior communication for unresolved concerns.

- Maintain professionalism, accuracy, and timeliness across all communication and documentation.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

- Must be 30 years old or above.

- Minimum 2 years of experience in Short-Term Rental operations (strict requirement).

- Strong experience in Airbnb, BdC, Hospitable, PriceLabs, Asana, Trello, KeyNest, TT Lock, RingCentral, and Bl
.

- Excellent written and spoken English.

- Outstanding attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment with strict response times.

- Comfortable working under close supervision and following established processes.

- Must consistently respond within 5 minutes during shift hours.

- Own phone and laptop with reliable high-speed internet.

- Willing to install all required apps on your devices.

- No other jobs or side commitments—full focus is required.

- Backup power or secondary internet is a plus.



WORK SETUP

- Full-time, remote role

- 48 hours per week

- Schedule aligned with Australian time zone 

- No monitoring apps (Time Doctor, Hubstaff, etc.)—we operate on trust and accountability



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, applicants must submit:

- Shareable link to your updated resume/CV

- Your expected salary range (minimum and maximum)



? Applications missing the CV link or salary range will not be considered.

title: Experienced B2B Telemarketer To Cold Call & Schedule Appointments
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center. We are a small team with an owner focussed on helping the team get real results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it! You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected. We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: HR Quality Assurance Specialist (Training & Development Support)
description:
Job Description: HR Quality Assurance Specialist (Training & Clinical Support)

Children’s Advocate Behavioral Health Clinic

Position Overview

Children’s Advocate is seeking a highly reliable, (degree preferred) detail-oriented Quality Assurance Specialist to support our growing behavioral health team. This role ensures that Therapist Mentors deliver high-quality clinical sessions, follow established policies and procedures, and maintain accurate data collection and documentation.

The QA Specialist plays a key role in training, development, observation, and compliance, and must maintain professional boundaries while providing corrective guidance when needed.

Key Responsibilities

Training & Development Oversight

Support ongoing training of Therapist Mentors.





Ensure mentors follow clinical protocols, program expectations, and data collection requirements.





Provide real-time coaching, redirection, or clarification as needed.





Clinical Quality Assurance

Observe therapy sessions (in-person or via video) to monitor accuracy, performance, and session integrity.





Video-record clinical trials and submit them for review with the Clinical Director.





Provide feedback to mentors to improve intervention quality, professionalism, and compliance.





Ensure all session notes, DAP notes, and data-entry tasks are completed accurately and on time.





Documentation & Compliance

Maintain high-quality records, checklists, and observation logs.





Conduct weekly accuracy audits on documentation and mentor performance.





Support adherence to all clinic policies and professional standards.





Professional Conduct

Maintain neutrality and professionalism — this is not a social role.





Uphold confidentiality, clinical boundaries, and ethical standards at all times.

Required Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree or higher (Psychology, Social Work, Human Services, Nursing, Education, or related field preferred).





Experience working in counseling, therapy, behavioral health, or clinical settings with children.





Experience with play therapy, child development, or child-centered interventions is a strong plus.





Strong communication, observation, and documentation skills.





Ability to provide corrective feedback professionally and confidently.





Comfortable using video recording tools and digital documentation systems.





Must be dependable, punctual, and committed to consistent attendance.

Compensation

Training Rate: $5.00 per hour (U.S. currency)





Training Duration: 30–60 days





Regular Role Rate: $6.00–$8.00 per hour





Bonuses: Available for 100?curacy in documentation and quality assurance





This role pays for productivity (time actively completing assigned tasks × hours worked).

Position Type

Full-Time or Part-Time

Available Shifts (Monday–Friday):

8:00 AM – 12:00 PM





12:00 PM – 4:00 PM





4:00 PM – 8:00 PM





Saturday Shifts (as needed based on client volume):

8:00 AM – 12:00 PM





12:00 PM – 4:00 PM





Application Requirements

Introduction Video

Who you are





Why you believe you are a great fit for the HR-QA role

How to Be Successful in This Role

 Serious about their work

 Not overly social with mentors during sessions ? Consistent, disciplined, and highly reliable

 Passionate about quality, accuracy, and client safety

title: Brand & Packaging Designer
description:
We need a creative packaging designer to help us develop an engaging and visually appealing box for our new card game.



This is an adult, queer party card game designed for groups of gay men to play together. The game blends icebreakers, questions, pop culture, emotional depth, and dares. There will be 250 cards across 7 categories. Each category will have a different color/design but the cards in the same category can all look the same. Each card will have a different question on it. People will pull a card from the middle and answer the question. Each person will also have one card they can use to pass a question. The rules will be minimal and simple.



This is a real product moving toward manufacturing, not a concept project.



Key Deliverables



Logo / Wordmark

- Clean, confident, and bold

- Should work on packaging, cards, and social media



Card Design System

- Poker-size cards (2.5” × 3.5”)

- A reusable layout that works across multiple decks

- Each deck has a different color theme but the same structure

- Clear category title + readable body text

- Designed for full-bleed color printing



Box Packaging

- Design for a small rigid box. I'll attach an example of the box.

- Front, back, and sides

- Strong shelf presence and clear explanation of what the game is

- Fun, sexy, and playful



Instruction Sheet

- One-page, double-sided folded insert

- Easy to understand, visually engaging

- Matches the card and box aesthetic



Production-Ready Files

- Print-ready PDFs. I'll attach the manufacturers template for the box and cards.

- CMYK color mode

- Bleed and crop marks included

- Box dielines

- Files ready to hand directly to a manufacturer



What I’ll Provide

- Finalized card text for all decks

- Game rules and mechanics

title: Shopify E-Commerce Manager / Email Marketer for Skill Toy brand (WITH BONUSES)
description:
I’m Slinky Josh, a content creator with 4 million total followers on social media. I make entertaining, funny, and wholesome videos where I perfor
smerizing tricks with a plastic slinky, and surprise people with my skill in public.



More importantly, I sell my brand of "slinky" (called HyperSpring), which are designed for doing tricks with, and I sell video courses where I teach people how to do the sort of tricks that I do (which I've dubbed "springbending"). I put "slinky" in quotes because Slinky is technically a specific trademarked brand of toy spring (my competitor), though "slinky" is also used as a generic term for the toy in English. 



I am looking for someone highly intelligent and detail-oriented to become my right-hand assistant. My goal is for you to completely take over the day-to-day running of the business, so that I can focus on creating content to grow the business. ?



You will have the opportunity to grow with my business, and if you prove yourself, make much more money than the starting pay that I have posted this listing at. I am in this for the long haul. I am on a mission to spread the joy of springbending around the globe and turn HyperSpring into the #1 brand of toy spring in the world. I have grown this business from a side hustle into a full career over the past 8 years, and I fully intend to continue on this mission until the day I die. ?



*****

BONUSES



To ensure you are as motivated as I am to grow this business, for at least the next 6 months, you will have the following bonus structure in addition to your base hourly pay of $7/hour:



***At the end of each month, you will receive 8% of monthly e-commerce revenue that exceeds $8,000 USD.***



(For context, the business is currently averaging $6000 to $7000 per month in e-commerce revenue.)



(“E-commerce revenue” here means Shopify, plus any other sales channels we end up adding, such as Amazon. It does not include any content creation income which I receive directly from YouTube,
, and TikTok, since that won’t be your focus.)



So for example, if we make $10,000 in revenue for April, you will receive a bonus of (10,000-8,000)*0.08 = $160. 



If we make $15,653, you will receive (15,653-8,000)*0.08 = $612.24. 



And if you can help me get revenue to $30,000 in a month, you will receive (30,000 - 8,000)*0.08 = $1,760. 



There is no cap on this bonus structure. 

If you can get us to $50,000 in a month, your monthly bonus will be $3,360.



This is very possible, since my digital video courses are very undersold in comparison to the HyperSprings, and I have an
 list with 17,000 subscribers which is going almost completely unused currently. There is a LOT of room for us to grow massively. 



For your first month, the bonus will be pro-rated for the number of days you worked in the month. So for example, if I hired you on the 12th of March, it would be (31-12)/31 = 0.613 times whatever the bonus would have been for that month. 



This bonus structure will continue for the next 6 months. After that, I’ll re-evaluate your pay structure to make sure your pay is proportional to your work, while also making sure you stay highly motivated to grow the business. 



*****



Your duties will include:

•
 marketing (including setting up automation flows - I currently have almost none)

• Answering customer service
s (low volume)

• Updating and improving my website, taking SEO into account

•
ing contractors I work with

• Researching random things & reporting back to me

• Checking up on shipments in my 3PL's website & Shopify

• Crunching a few numbers in Google Sheets

• Setting up & maintaining other sales platforms (e.g. Amazon, TikTok Shop, Instagram/Facebook)

• Potentially running ads on
, Google, etc.

• Any other random online tasks I need help with



Here are my non-negotiables. I am looking for someone who:

• Speaks and writes fluent English

• Types decently fast (I will test you on both of these over video)

• Has some kind of marketing experience, ideally
 marketing

• Is intelligent & can think & act independently 



If you have experience with any of the following, that's a plus:

• Shopify

• Course Creator 360

• SEO

• Customer service

• Google Sheets or Excel

• Amazon

• TikTok Shop

• Meta Business Suite (specifically the shopping feature)

• Google Ads

• ClickFunnels

• Building sales funnels in general

• Video editing

• Bookkeeping (Quickbooks)



?****?

HOURS?



I will expect you to work 40 hours a week. ?I will always allow you to pick your own hours, but you must let me know what hours you will work for the upcoming week beforehand, and stick to the schedule you set, or let me know if you need to make any changes. 



I am in Japan until the end of May, which is only 1 hour ahead of Philippines time, so for this time I would like a lot of our hours to overlap so I can train you. ?After that, I will return to the US for at least 2 months, but you can keep working whatever hours you want. 

I will expect you to keep a log of everything you work on each day, and
 it to me at the end of your work day. ??



****?

About AI:

I am 100% fine with you using AI to research, strategize, and bounce ideas off of. In fact I will expect you to use it this way in the course of this job. I will also be fine with you using AI to correct your spelling and grammar in communications with my customers. 



However, you must not use AI to write your application to me, or any messages to me ever. I am trying to hire a person, not ChatGPT, and I need to communicate directly with the person I am hiring. I need to know YOUR strengths and weaknesses, not ChatGPT’s. If I get even a hint that your application or resume was copied and pasted from ChatGPT or any other LLM, I will throw your application in the proverbial trash can. ??



****

In your application, please answer the following questions:



• What is your marketing experience? Please describe it in detail. Please do not bother applying to this job if you do not have any marketing experience. 

• What other relevant experience do you have? Please describe in detail.

• What tools do you use to stay organized?

• What would your
 marketing strategy look like for me? (Given I already have a list with 17,000
 addresses that is almost completely unused)

• If I hired you on March 17, and we made $7,482 that month in e-commerce revenue, what would your bonus be for that month? 

• Why do you want to work for me?

• At what age did you start learning English? And how did you learn?

• Do you own your own computer?

• Where do you live? 

• How fast is your internet? Please include a screenshot from an internet speed test.

• Where would you be working from? (Home, internet cafe, etc?)

• How frequently do you have power or internet outages there?

• Do you have a backup location you can work from in case of outages?

• Do you have any other job or school currently? And if so, how many hours a week? 

• How soon would you be able to start?

title: Remote Full-Stack Developer – Construction Tech AI Integrations Building AI-Powered Workflow Automation
description:
About the Company

Connacht Group is a Chicago-based general contractor specializing in hospitality construction projects. We manage complex commercial construction workflows involving detailed project management, subcontractor coordination, procurement, and contract management across multiple properties.

We’re modernizing our operational workflows by integrating AI and automation to reduce administrative burden on our project teams and improve project delivery outcomes.



The Role

We’re seeking an experienced full-stack developer to design and build multiple custom integrations that connect Claude AI, Procore (our project management platform), and other business tools we rely on. This is a long-term engagement to build several interconnected systems that will streamline critical workflows across our project teams.

Primary Integration: Claude + Procore Submittal Automation. This is a fully remote position.



What You’ll Build:

A web-based application that uses Claude AI to automate two critical construction workflows:

 1. Submittal Generation System

 ? Ingests project specification PDFs (
pages)

 ? Integrates Microsoft Project schedules

 ? Uses Claude to parse specs and identify all submittal requirements

 ? Generates comprehensive submittal logs in Excel format

 ? Creates Procore submittals via API

 ? Supports interactive refinement (users ask questions, Claude refines analysis)

 2. Submittal Review System

 ? Accepts incoming submittal packages (shop drawings, certifications, test reports, cut sheets)

 ? Retrieves project specifications and drawings from Procore

 ? Uses Claude + OCR to extract technical data from submittals

 ? Cross-checks compliance against specs and drawings

 ? Generates detailed PDF compliance reports with citations to spec sections

 ? Uploads review results back to Procore

 ? Supports iterative clarification loop with users

Key Technical Requirements:

 ? Procore API integration (OAuth authentication, submittal creation/updates, file uploads)

 ? Claude API integration (vision, document analysis, multi-turn conversations)

 ? PDF processing and OCR (handling scanned documents, technical drawings)

 ? Microsoft Project file parsing (.mpp, .xml schedule files)

 ? Web application frontend (React or similar) for upload, review, and approval

 ? Backend service (Python/FastAPI or Node/Express)

 ? Cloud hosting and database design

 ? Comprehensive error handling and validation

Secondary Integrations

You’ll also be building 2-3 additional integrations (to be discussed in detail upon engagement) that likely involve:

 ? Asana ? Procore task synchronization

 ?
/Microsoft Teams notifications and workflows

 ? Custom reporting and data pipeline automation



Technical Skills Required

Core Requirements (Must Have)

 ? 5+ years full-stack development (Python + React/Node, or equivalent modern stack)

 ? API integration experience – comfortable working with REST APIs, authentication (OAuth, API tokens), rate limiting

 ? PDF/document processing – experience with libraries like PDFPlumber, PyPDF, or similar

 ? Database design – SQL, schema design, proper data modeling

 ? Cloud platform experience – AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure (deployment, storage, security)

 ? Authentication & Security – securing API keys, environment management, HTTPS/TLS, data handling

Highly Valuable

 ? Large Language Model (LLM) integration – experience with Claude API, GPT APIs, or similar (prompt engineering, token management, cost optimization)

 ? OCR & Computer Vision – Tesseract, OpenCV, or similar libraries

 ? Construction industry knowledge – familiarity with construction workflows, Procore, or project management tools

 ? Procore API experience – prior integrations with Procore platform

 ? Document understanding – experience parsing technical documents, specifications, or complex PDFs

Nice to Have

 ? Experience with Model Context Protocols (MCPs) for AI integration

 ? GraphQL experience

 ? CI/CD and testing infrastructure (pytest, Jest, GitHub Actions)

 ? Serverless architecture (Lambda, Cloud Functions)

 ? Real-time features (WebSockets, Server-Sent Events)

title: English Virtual Assistant (Repost Messages)

Your job is to send other people links on items that can be bought low, and resold for higher, so they can make a profit from reselling them.

 server to another. Around 10-60 messages per day that is around 1-6 sentences.

You need to be able to understand English well, you can not sound like a robot.

Ex) Don't say "Ako ay 25 taong gulang."

Say "Ako ay dalawampu't limang taong gulang."



You need to be on time and repost within 0-2 mins. 

Last person got fired because of unpunctuality. 

If you are late consistently you will be fired, because your job is to help other people buy items from your links, if you are late, the product will sell out, and they won't be able to buy it and resell it for a profit.



We have more opportunities in the field available which can earn you up to 35k peso, with basically no additional work. 

You will need to be native speaker English level, in writing. 



If you are mass applying without even looking, do not apply for this job, because we will send follow up messages asking you to read and perform tasks, and if you don't do the example, you will not get a text back. Save us both time.



More detail

title: Outbound Sales Closer – Food / FMCG
description:
Read first:



This job is daily cold calling to takeaway shops & grocers in Australia.

If you don’t like cold calling, don’t apply.



What you do

• Call local takeaway shops & grocers

• Offer free samples

• Follow up after sample drops

• Convert the sample drop into a first full-price order

• Hours: Monday–Friday, Australian business hours (approx. 9am–5pm AEST)



Once a shop orders, the account is handed off.

You do not manage reorders or ongoing accounts.



What this is NOT

• No inbound leads

• No account management

• No marketing or strategy work



This is dial>talk >>>convert.



Pay

Commission is paid on adoption, not trials.

• AUD $1,000 monthly base

• AUD $30 one-off commission per converted account

o Commission is paid only when the shop places its first full-price order (2nd order)

o No commission on sample drops or discounted trial orders



Who should apply

• Comfortable making cold calls all day

• Proven experience hitting sales targets

• Can handle rejection

• Clear English

• Reliable and consistent



Sales experience helps. Discipline matters more.



REQUIRED TO APPLY



Applications without an answer will be ignored.



You are given a list of 150 takeaway shops to call in one working day.

How would you structure your calling day to get through the list and book trials?

(5–6 sentences max. Be practical.)

*** Attach your resume with your answer.

title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)



This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.



This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify fast, overcome objections, and close.



We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs (CompTIA, PMP, and related tracks). We provide warm leads. You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)



Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students



Run structured, consultative enrollment calls (needs analysis ? recommendation ? close)



Control the call, set next steps, and ask for the enrollment



Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency



Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies



Log activity and outcomes accurately in CRM



Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals



Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews



If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.



Who This Role Is For



Proven outbound / inside sales closers



Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone



Strong command of English with clear U.S. cultural fluency



Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions



Competitive, coachable, metrics-driven



Organized and accountable without supervision



Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus



Familiarity with certifications (CompTIA, PMP) helps—but closing ability matters more



Bachelor’s degree required



Who Should NOT Apply



Anyone who needs inbound-only leads



Anyone uncomfortable asking for money



Anyone who avoids objection handling



Anyone who wants a “soft” admissions role



Anyone who disappears when targets tighten



Schedule



Monday–Friday



10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST



Compensation



Base pay: $1,200–$1,600 USD per month



Performance-based advancement and leadership path



Long-term role with stability and growth for performers



(Top performers move fast. Average performers don’t last.)



What You Get



Warm leads with real intent



Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching



No gimmicks, no fake promises—just real programs that work



A sales culture that rewards results



Bottom Line



If you can:



Control a sales conversation



Build urgency without lying



Close consistently



Take coaching and improve



You will win here.



If not—this role will expose you quickly.

title: Salesforce Developer (Remote, Philippines)
description:
Now Hiring: Salesforce Administrator / Developer (Remote, Philippines)

We are a fast-growing education and training provider seeking a Salesforce Administrator/Developer to join our dynamic team. This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about optimizing Salesforce, enjoys problem-solving, and thrives in a collaborative, remote environment.

Key Responsibilities

• Configure, customize, and maintain Salesforce to support business operations.

• Develop and deploy custom objects, workflows, process builders, flows, and validation rules.

• Create and maintain reports, dashboards, and analytics for management and teams.

• Integrate Salesforce with third-party applications and tools.

• Support users with troubleshooting, training, and best practices.

• Work with leadership to streamline processes and improve CRM efficiency.

Qualifications

• Minimum 2 years of experience as a Salesforce Administrator or Developer.

• Salesforce Administrator certification required; Developer certification preferred.

• Strong knowledge of Salesforce Lightning, automation tools, and data management.

• Experience with Apex, Visualforce, and API integrations a plus.

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.

Salary Range:

• Mid-Level:Php 55,000 – Php 85,000/month ( $950 USD – $1,465 USD)

• Senior-Level: Php 105,000 – Php 116,000+/month ( $1,800 USD – $2,000+ USD)

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor
description:
Title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-time | 40 hours/week | 1pm–9pm PH Time (aligned with Dubai working hours)

Salary: Based on experience and skillset + performance bonus + paid UK bank holidays + paid day off on your birthday.



The Role:



This is a creative-led design and video editing role for someone who wants to own the visual identity of a fast-growing wellness brand. You'll be our lead creative resource—ideating and executing concepts across
, social media (organic and paid), YouTube, campaigns, and digital channels. You'll bring briefs to life from concept to execution, edit compelling videos, design assets, and help shape our overall content strategy. If you live and breathe design and video, understand what makes content scroll-stopping, and want to build something that matters — this is it.



What You'll Do:



> Design assets and create content across all digital channels

> Edit video content for social media (short-form) and YouTube (long-form)

> Cut, splice, and assemble footage into engaging narratives

> Add music, sound effects, subtitles, text overlays, and motion graphics

> Source and integrate stock footage where needed

> Bring creative briefs to life—from ideation to concept development and final execution

> Develop and evolve the brand identity while acting as a brand guardian

> Deliver best-in-class visual assets that perform

> Ensure visual consistency and alignment with brand guidelines across all touch-points



Non-Negotiables:



> Excellent working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (especially Premiere Pro, After Effects) and Figma

> Strong video editing skills with a portfolio demonstrating your work

> Ability to edit both short-form social content and long-form YouTube videos

> Experience adding subtitles, text overlays, music, and sound design

> Strong portfolio demonstrating design, typography, layout, and video editing

> An eye for good design, branding, social media trends, and marketing

> Meticulous attention to detail and strong project management skills

> Team player who thrives in a collaborative environment



Strong Preference If You…



> Have a degree in Graphic Design, Video Editing, or similar

> Have experience with AI tools like Midjourney, Nano Banana, or similar for content creation

> Understand social media platforms deeply and what makes content perform

> Can demonstrate video content that's driven engagement or growth

> Have experience with motion graphics and animation



What Success Looks Like:



> Our visual identity feels distinctive, consistent, and evolving

> Video content performs—high watch time, engagement, shares, and saves

> Social videos and YouTube content come to life beautifully

> You're generating ideas the team gets excited about

> The brand feels cohesive and premium across every touchpoint



About Innermost:



We believe the path to better health lies in a balance of nature and science. Inspired by ancient wisdom and powered by modern evidence-based research, we've crafted a new approach to wellness — natural ingredients that have stood the test of time combined with cutting-edge science to create products that are as effective as they are authentic. We've experienced significant growth and have ambitious plans for the future. If you want to be part of a team that's changing an entire industry, we'd love to hear from you. Learn more at 



Application Process: 



Please send the following via the OnlineJobs portal:



> Your CV

> Your creative portfolio including video editing examples (essential — we need to see your work)

> A 60-second Loom video explaining why you'd be a great fit



And then please answer these questions in your application:



> Do you have excellent working knowledge across Adobe Creative Suite and Figma?

> Where do you live; city or village?

> How fast is your internet and do you have reliable electricity?



We get many applications from people who don't fulfil these requests or answer those questions, and who are not considered as a result. Don't let that be you. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Zoom interview. Thank you.

title: Real Estate Data & Lead Generation (Public Records Research VA)
description:
About Us



Polus Acquisitions Group is a U.S.-based real estate investment company that specializes in acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. Our business is built on identifying motivated sellers through public records research, data analysis, and targeted outreach.



We operate remotely and collaborate as a team across several departments including data research, lead generation, marketing, and acquisitions. Our system is designed to consistently generate new opportunities by pulling property data from government sources and turning that data into conversations with homeowners.



We are currently looking for a Real Estate Data & Lead Generation Manager who can take ownership of our lead generation pipeline and help ensure our data systems run smoothly and consistently.



Compensation



Base Salary: $400 per month



Paid bi-weekly (every two weeks).



In addition to base salary, bonuses are paid when contracts close from leads that you generated and managed.



This means the quality and consistency of your work directly impacts your ability to earn additional income.



Schedule



Full-time position



Monday – Friday

40 hours per week



Some overlap with U.S. business hours may be required for communication with the team.



How Our System Works



Our company uses a data-driven system to identify homeowners who may be interested in selling their property.



The process begins with public records research, where we locate property owners through county government databases, court records, and property tax systems.



After the data is collected, it is cleaned, verified, and organized before being uploaded into our CRM. From there, our marketing systems contact property owners through SMS outreach and other marketing channels.



If a homeowner expresses interest in selling, the lead is documented and passed to our acquisitions team who negotiates and closes the deal.



Your role is to ensure that new leads are consistently entering the system and that the data is clean, accurate, and organized.



Your Responsibilities

Public Records Research



You will regularly research and navigate U.S. county public records websites to locate property ownership data.



Examples include:



• Probate filings

• Tax delinquent properties

• Pre-foreclosure filings

• Code violations

• Property transfers

• Eviction filings



You must be comfortable navigating:



• County clerk websites

• District clerk court records

• Property appraisal district websites

• Tax assessor databases

• Recorder / deed records



Data Collection & Verification



You will gather important information including:



• Property address

• Owner name

• Mailing address

• Parcel / APN number

• Filing details when applicable



You will also verify ownership data by cross-checking multiple sources.



Data Cleaning & List Preparation



You will organize and prepare data by:



• Removing duplicate records

• Standardizing address formatting

• Cleaning and organizing spreadsheets

• Preparing CSV files for CRM import



Accuracy and organization are extremely important.



Skip Tracing



Once property data is collected, you will assist with skip tracing to locate contact information for property owners.



This may include finding:



• Phone numbers

•
 addresses

• Additional ownership records



SMS Lead Generation



Once leads are prepared, they will be uploaded into our system for SMS marketing campaigns.



You may assist with:



• Preparing lead lists

• Managing responses from property owners

• Updating CRM records

• Identifying interested sellers



Independence & Problem Solving



This role requires someone who can think independently and figure things out without constant supervision.



We will provide training materials and SOPs that explain our systems and processes, but we expect team members to take initiative and learn how to navigate tools, websites, and workflows on their own.



You should be comfortable:



• Researching solutions when systems are unfamiliar

• Navigating new county websites independently

• Solving problems without needing step-by-step guidance for every task



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of their responsibilities and help keep the system running smoothly.



Team Collaboration



Although independence is important, communication with the team is equally important.



You will work alongside:



• Data researchers

• Lead managers

• Acquisitions specialists



You must be able to:



• Provide updates on your work

• Communicate issues clearly

• Coordinate with team members when leads move through the pipeline



Strong teamwork and communication are essential to keeping the operation running effectively.



Requirements



• Strong research and problem-solving skills

• Experience working with spreadsheets and datasets

• Ability to navigate websites and collect information

• Strong attention to detail

• Reliable internet and quiet work environment

• Strong English communication skills



Experience with real estate, property data, or lead generation is highly preferred.



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



• Is proactive and self-motivated

• Can figure things out without constant supervision

• Is organized and detail-oriented

• Works well in a team environment

• Takes pride in producing accurate and reliable data



Why Join Our Team



This is an opportunity to work directly with a growing U.S. real estate investment company and gain valuable experience in real estate lead generation, property research, and data systems.



Team members who perform well will have opportunities for long-term growth and increased responsibility within the company.



How to Apply



To apply, please follow these instructions carefully.



Send your application to [Insert
 Address]



Subject Line: Data & Lead Generation Manager – OJPH



Attach your resume



Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction



At the top of your application include the phrase:



“PUBLIC RECORDS VA”



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.
