title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer
description:
Explomo is looking for a talented YouTube thumbnail designer who understands cinematic storytelling and can translate a video’s atmosphere into a powerful visual that attracts viewers without compromising authenticity.



Explomo is a documentary-style YouTube channel focused on exploring abandoned places across Europe — from forgotten castles and noble mansions to untouched time-capsule homes and historic estates. Each episode uncovers the story of the people who once lived there and preserves these places before they disappear.



The channel currently has hundreds of videos and a large international audience, built around a consistent visual identity and a strong focus on atmosphere, history, and mystery.



Because of this, thumbnails need to do more than just look good — they must capture the story, tension, and curiosity of the exploration itself.



What we’re looking for



We are searching for someone who:

- Understands YouTube psychology and CTR-driven thumbnail design

- Can create thumbnails similar in style and impact to creators like this:



- Is able to watch a video and identify the key visual story or 
nt

- Can translate that 
nt into a thumbnail that sparks curiosity instantly

- Knows how to balance strong visual hooks with authenticity

- Understands that Explomo thumbnails should feel cinematic, mysterious, and real — not overly clickbait



Important qualities

The ideal candidate:

- Has experience designing YouTube thumbnails that perform well

- Has a strong eye for composition, lighting, and storytelling

- Can work with dramatic interiors, abandoned locations, and atmospheric scenes

- Is comfortable experimenting with ideas while keeping the Explomo brand identity consistent

- Understands that sometimes less is more — a single powerful image can outperform a cluttered design



Workflow

Typical workflow may look like this:

- Watch the video or selected 
nts.

- Identify the core story or discovery in the episode.

- Design a thumbnail that visually communicates that 
nt.

- Deliver multiple variations if needed for A/B/C testing.



Rate

???? Rate per thumbnail is negotiable, depending on experience and quality.

This is potentially long-term work, as Explomo regularly publishes new episodes and series.



To apply

Please include:

- Examples of YouTube thumbnails you designed. Only include examples that you genuinely believe would be a great fit for the style and atmosphere of the Explomo channel, or designs that demonstrate you could create thumbnails in a similar cinematic and storytelling-driven style.

- Links to channels/videos where your thumbnails were used

- A short explanation of how you approach CTR-driven thumbnail design

- (Optional) A sample thumbnail idea for an Explomo-style video



If you understand storytelling through images — and know how to turn a quiet abandoned place into a thumbnail that makes people click — we’d love to hear from you.



Maureno

Explomo

title: Lead Generation & Social Media Marketing Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Title: Lead Generation & Social Media Marketing Virtual Assistant (Full-Time)



Company: Cramerton Clean Pros

Salary: $565/month + performance-based bonuses



---



About Us



Cramerton Clean Pros is a North Carolina–based exterior cleaning and restoration company. We specialize in pressure washing, soft washing, window cleaning, and a wide variety of exterior cleaning services for residential and commercial properties.



Our company prides itself on high-quality service and strong dedication to our customers. As we continue to grow, we are looking for a talented and motivated Virtual Assistant who can help us expand our marketing reach and generate new commercial opportunities.



---



Position Overview



We are looking for a Lead Generation & Social Media Marketing Virtual Assistant whose primary focus will be generating new leads and growing our brand presence online.



This is not a basic administrative position. We want someone who is creative, proactive, and motivated to help grow a real business.



Your work will directly contribute to bringing in new commercial clients and expanding our digital presence.



---



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation & Outreach



Your primary responsibility will be generating leads through strategic outreach and research.



This may include:



- Researching businesses that may need exterior cleaning services

- Prospecting commercial and industrial clients

- Building prospect lists

- Reaching out through methods such as:

  - LinkedIn outreach

  -
 outreach

  - Social media messaging

  - Business research and prospecting

- Identifying opportunities to promote services such as:

  - Window cleaning

  - Commercial pressure washing

  - Building washing

  - Exterior cleaning services

- Helping generate 5+ qualified leads per week



Target industries include:



- Property managers

- Apartment complexes

- HOAs

- Restaurants

- Retail centers

- Warehouses

- Industrial facilities

- Office buildings



---



Social Media Management



You will also manage and grow our social media presence.



Responsibilities include:



- Creating social media posts

- Scheduling content

- Engaging with followers

- Responding to comments and messages

- Growing our audience and engagement

- Assisting with brand awareness initiatives



Platforms include:



-

- Instagram

- TikTok

- LinkedIn

- Meta Business Suite



---



Marketing & Strategy Support



We want someone who can think creatively and help us grow.



This may include:



- Suggesting new lead generation strategies

- Researching outreach opportunities

- Helping develop marketing campaigns

- Supporting digital marketing initiatives



---



Tools You May Use



You may work with tools such as:



- Housecall Pro

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Canva

- Meta Business Suite

- ChatGPT

- Other related marketing or outreach software



---



Work Schedule



- Full-time position

- Preferred hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

- Schedule may be flexible but must overlap with U.S. Eastern Time



---



Compensation



- $565/month

- Performance-based bonuses available for:

  - Lead generation performance

  - Successful outreach campaigns

  - Social media growth and engagement



---



Requirements



- Experience with lead generation, outreach, or marketing

- Experience managing social media accounts

- Excellent written English

- Strong spoken English

- Neutral accent is a bonus but not required

- Reliable internet connection

- Quiet work environment

- Good audio quality for communication



---



Growth Opportunity



This position has massive upward mobility for the right person.



The right candidate — someone who is dedicated, detail-oriented, and brings a positive attitude — can grow into a Digital Operations Manager role within our company as we continue expanding.



We are looking for someone who wants to build a long-term career with us, not just a temporary job.



---



How to Apply



To apply, please follow these instructions carefully:



1. At the top of your application, include the word CRAMERTON so we know you read the entire job post.

2. Provide a 30-second audio recording introducing yourself.

3. Briefly describe your experience with lead generation or social media marketing.



OR



1: Go to 
/contact-us and fill out the form, in the additional notes section let us know that you are applying for this position!



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



We look forward to meeting you!

title: LinkedIn Engagement and Community Specialist
description:
Role Overview:



We are seeking a 
munity Manager with a proven track record to lead and enhance our social media presence on LinkedIn. This role is pivotal in driving brand visibility, fostering meaningful engagement, and contributing to business growth. You will work closely with our content and copywriting teams to transform content into engaging LinkedIn posts, strategically incorporating tags, hashtags, and other platform-specific features. If you are looking for a traditional "lead generation" role, this position is not for you.



Key Responsibilities:

Strategic Content Management: Collaborate with our content and copywriting teams to adapt and optimise content for LinkedIn, ensuring posts are engaging and aligned with our strategic goals. This includes selecting appropriate tags, hashtags, and other LinkedIn features to maximise reach and impact.

Engagement and Community Building: Actively engage with new and existing audiences by initiating conversations, tagging relevant individuals and organisations, and fostering meaningful interactions that drive brand awareness and community growth.

Trend Monitoring and Adaptation: Stay ahead of industry trends and LinkedIn platform updates, using insights to recommend new strategies and content formats that keep our brand relevant and engaging.

Performance Analysis: Regularly track and analyse LinkedIn metrics, providing actionable insights and reports to refine our content strategy and optimise engagement.

Collaborative Integration: Work seamlessly with internal teams to ensure LinkedIn initiatives align with broader marketing strategies, contributing to the overall success of our campaigns.

Profile Optimisation: Continuously review and optimise LinkedIn profiles to maximise visibility, reach, and impact across all our LinkedIn activities.

Responsive Communication: Manage inquiries and feedback on LinkedIn promptly and professionally, ensuring our community feels heard and valued.



Key Skills and Competencies:



LinkedIn Expertise: Deep understanding of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices, with at least 2 years of professional experience managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Content Optimisation: Ability to work with content and copywriting teams to turn content into engaging LinkedIn posts, utilising tags, hashtags, and other features to enhance visibility.

Analytical Mindset: Proficient in using LinkedIn metrics and analytics to drive performance improvements and inform content strategies.

Collaborative Spirit: Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams, integrating LinkedIn efforts with broader marketing and business goals.

Proactive and Trend-Focused: A keen eye for spotting emerging trends on LinkedIn and the initiative to implement them in our strategies.

Strong Communication: Excellent written communication skills, with an emphasis on clarity, creativity, and attention to detail.

Organisational Skills: Capable of managing multiple tasks and projects simultaneously while maintaining a high level of quality and consistency.



Qualifications and Experience:



Professional Experience: Minimum of 2 years managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.

Platform Proficiency: In-depth knowledge of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices.

Content Optimisation: Experience in adapting and optimising content for LinkedIn to enhance engagement.

Analytical Skills: Demonstrable experience with LinkedIn metrics and analytics for performance tracking and improvement.

title: Product Manager - SaaS
description:
gigCMO is a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic Product Manager to lead and enhance our Digital Church Platform®. The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing the product development lifecycle, managing development resources effectively, and ensuring rigorous final testing processes before releasing software updates. You will also play a critical role in translating the strategic vision held by the founder into actionable roadmaps and product deliverables.



Key Responsibilities:



- Manage the Product Development (PD) pipeline, ensuring alignment with organisational goals.

- Prioritise and allocate development resources efficiently to align with strategic priorities.

- Conduct comprehensive final testing and quality assurance to guarantee smooth, error-free software updates before public release.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to deliver product enhancements that meet user needs and drive platform adoption.

- Communicate clearly and proactively with stakeholders regarding project timelines, milestones, and release schedules.

- Translate strategic vision and high-level ideas from leadership into actionable product roadmaps, user stories, and specifications. 

- Facilitate clear and consistent communication between non-technical stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring all parties are aligned.

- Set up and manage internal systems (e.g. Basecamp and HubSpot) to track backlog, sprints, and milestones.

- Gather feedback from churches and users to shape future features and improvements. 

- Monitor product performance or user feedback loops to inform decisions and prioritisation. 

- Monitor incoming requests via helpdesk and chat channels, triage issues, and ensure timely resolution either directly or by coordinating with the development team.



Qualifications:



- Proven experience in Product Management, ideally within digital platforms or SaaS environments.

- Strong organisational skills with an ability to manage multiple development priorities simultaneously.

- Exceptional attention to detail, particularly in software testing and quality assurance.

- Demonstrable capability in managing software product lifecycles effectively.

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, able to engage stakeholders at various levels.

- Previous experience in digital community platforms or faith-based digital services is advantageous but not essential.

- Experience writing product requirements, specs, and user stories to support development.

- Understanding of user needs in faith-based or nonprofit contexts, particularly around compliance, admin, or community tools, is highly desirable. 

- A mindset geared toward scalability, continuous improvement, and hands-on problem solving in an early-stage SaaS environment.



Application Requirements:



- This role demands a full-time commitment and is not compatible with another full-time job. To be considered, kindly fill out the form using this link: 

- Incomplete submissions will not be considered.

title: Direct Response Editor VSL
description:

You will receive finished copywriting scripts for VSLs (Video Sales Letters) and your job is to turn them into engaging videos by selecting and editing the right B-roll footage for each scene.



The videos are typically 1–5 minutes long and follow a structured direct response format used in Meta and TikTok ads.



Responsibilities:

Your main task will be writing ad scripts, hooks and primary texts for Meta ads, which will later be turned into video creatives.



You should also be comfortable doing product and market research, analyzing competitors, and using tools like the Meta Ad Library to identify winning angles and ad concepts.

Requirements

title: Marketing Agency Operations & Account Manager
description:
ABOUT US



We are a growing digital marketing agency that helps businesses generate leads through paid advertising.



We are looking for a highly organized Operations & Account Manager who will help run the day-to-day operations of the agency while managing client communication and reporting.



You will work directly with the founder and campaign manager to ensure campaigns run smoothly and clients receive excellent service.



This is a long-term role with growth opportunities for someone who enjoys building systems and managing operations.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Client Communication



* Respond to client
s and messages

* Send campaign updates and monthly reports

* Schedule client calls when needed

* Ensure clients feel supported and informed



Operations & Project Management



* Manage tasks inside ClickUp, Asana, or similar tools

* Coordinate work with the campaign manager

* Track deadlines and campaign launches

* Ensure projects are completed on time



Client Onboarding



* Send onboarding forms to new clients

* Collect account access and assets

* Prepare campaign launch checklists



Performance Monitoring



* Monitor campaign KPIs such as leads, CPL, and conversions

* Flag performance issues to the campaign manager

* Ensure reports are accurate and delivered on time



Client Success



* Maintain strong client relationships

* Identify opportunities for account growth

* Ensure clients are satisfied with the service



REQUIREMENTS



Must Have



* Excellent written and spoken English

* Strong organization and project management skills

* Experience working with a digital marketing or PPC agency

* Experience with ClickUp, Asana, Trello, or similar tools

* Ability to manage multiple clients and projects



Nice to Have



* Basic knowledge of Google Ads or PPC

* Experience with Looker Studio or marketing reporting tools

* Client success or account management experience



WORK SCHEDULE



Full-time position (40 hours per week)

Must have 6–8 hours overlap with PST time zone.



SALARY



$1,500 – $2,000 USD per month depending on experience.



HOW TO APPLY



To apply for this role, please follow these instructions carefully.

1) Record a Loom video (2–3 minutes).

In the Loom video, please answer the following:

-Introduce yourself and your background

-Describe your experience working in a marketing or PPC agency

-Explain how you would organize onboarding for a new client to ensure campaigns launch smoothly

2) Start your Loom video by saying:

"Hi, my name is ___ and I am applying for the Operations & Account Manager role."

3) Include the word SYSTEMS at the beginning of your application message so we know you read the job description.



IMPORTANT NOTE



Agency experience is required. Please do not apply if you have never worked inside a digital marketing agency.

title: Revenue Analyst/Assistant
description:
Location: Remote

Company: Prim Short Stays Ltd

Working Hours: Part time 25 hours with Monday to Friday 10am - 3pm UK time (option for Full time as role develops)

Reports To: Revenue Manager 

About Prim Short Stays

Prim Short Stays is a dynamic and growing provider of premium short-term rental accommodations. We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional guest experiences while maximizing occupancy and revenue through data-driven strategies and innovative thinking.

Role Overview

This role has a strong focus on the near-term trading window — monitoring forward occupancy, identifying gaps in the calendar, and taking proactive action to protect revenue. The primary objective is to maximise revenue in the immediate and short-term booking window, while supporting longer-term pricing and forecasting strategy. We are looking for a Revenue Analyst to support the Head of Revenue in driving performance across:

Our internal short-term rental portfolio 

External client portfolios where we provide revenue management as a service 

Key Responsibilities

Monitor Forward Occupancy & Calendar Gaps

 Track bookings for the next 0–90 days, identify low-occupancy dates, and highlight gaps or at-risk periods.

Pricing Adjustments

 Action short-term rate changes to improve pickup and reduce unlet nights, using dynamic pricing tools (e.g., PriceLabs).

Short-Term Forecasting & Reporting

 Support weekly trading reports, track short-term pickup versus forecast, and maintain clear forward-looking revenue summaries.

Channel & Property Support

 Ensure properties are competitively positioned across OTAs, monitor cancellation trends, and support margin protection through channel mix adjustments.

External Client Portfolio Management

 Assist in monitoring managed client portfolios, providing data-driven recommendations and supporting concise commercial reporting.

New Client Set up

Assist in auditing new listings to ensure property profile can compete competently, identifying key events in the local area for pricing maximisation strategy. As well as utilise projections to advise on initial pricing set up strategy within the local market. 

Systems You’ll Use

Property Management System (PMS)

Dynamic pricing tools (e.g. PriceLabs) 

OTA extranets (Airbnb, Booking.com, Vrbo) 

Excel / Google Sheets 

Internal performance dashboards

Skills and Experience

Essential

Experience in revenue management, short-term rentals, or hospitality

Familiarity with dynamic pricing tools (e.g., PriceLabs) and OTA platforms (Airbnb, Booking.com)

Strong analytical skills with attention to detail

Proficiency in spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

Ability to monitor and manage short-term booking windows proactively

Organised and able to prioritise multiple tasks effectively

Comfortable working independently and taking initiative within set guidelines

Clear written and verbal communication skills

Additional / Preferred

Experience in remote or hybrid working environments

Technically adept with the ability to learn and troubleshoot digital tools

Familiarity with property management systems (PMS), channel managers, and digital operations integrations

Experience supporting external client portfolios is a plus

Interest in data analytics or dynamic pricing strategies

Experience with collaboration tools such as Notion, Slack, Missive, or Trello

Experience in property operations or short-let management desirable but not essential

Benefits

Flexible, remote-friendly working setup

Opportunity to develop practical skills in revenue management for both internal and client portfolios

Work with a collaborative, growing, and supportive team

Contribute directly to optimising revenue across multiple properties and locations

To Apply:

Please submit your CV

title: Digital Growth & Donor Relationships Specialist
description:
The Mission

We are seeking a high-performance, results-oriented Digital Growth Specialist to serve as the engine behind our donor engagement and brand visibility. This is not a "task-taker" role; we are looking for a Digital Architect who can leverage AI and modern tech stacks to drive fundraising and expand our global reach. You will be responsible for the seamless integration of our CRM, marketing, and web platforms to ensure every donor feels valued and every campaign hits its target.



The Core Tech Stack

CRM: Bloomerang

Fundraising: Givebutter

 Marketing: Mailchimp

CMS: Prismic (Headless CMS)

Social Media: Instagram, YouTube,

Design & AI: Canva, Adobe Suite, ChatGPT/Claude/Midjourney



Primary Responsibilities

1. Donor Relationship Management (CRM)

Manage the Bloomerang database with 100?curacy; ensuring all gifts from Givebutter are synced and acknowledged.

Segment donor lists for targeted appeals and monthly partner updates.

Generate weekly reports on fundraising progress toward our $10k+ monthly goals.

2. Multi-Channel Marketing & Design

Graphic Design: Create high-impact social media assets,
 headers, and campaign flyers that align with our brand identity.

 (Mailchimp): Draft, design, and schedule weekly newsletters and urgent "Call to Action" blasts.

Social Media: Execute a content calendar across IG, FB, and YouTube. This includes video clipping for Reels/Shorts and engaging with the community.

3. Website & Digital Maintenance

Perform "Hands-On" updates to our website via Prismic, ensuring all event dates, partner logos, and landing pages are current.

Troubleshoot display issues and coordinate with the web team for structural changes.

4. AI-Driven Efficiency

Utilize Generative AI to draft copy, brainstorm campaign themes, and automate repetitive data tasks.

Stay on the cutting edge of AI tools to increase the "Velocity" of our output without sacrificing quality.



Qualifications & Requirements

Experience: 2+ years in a digital marketing or VA role, preferably for a non-profit or ministry.

Technical Proficiency: Proven experience with Bloomerang, Mailchimp, and Givebutter is highly preferred.

Communication: Exceptional written English skills with a "Servant’s Heart" tone.

Aesthetics: A strong eye for clean, modern graphic design.

Reliability: High-speed internet and a dedicated workspace for real-time collaboration.



Compensation & Benefits

Monthly Salary: $500 USD.

Environment: Work with a global team of high-level executives and innovators.

Growth: Hands-on experience with emerging AI technologies and enterprise-grade software.



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit:

Your Portfolio (Graphic Design and Social Media examples).

A brief description of your experience with Bloomerang or Givebutter.

An example of how you have used AI to improve your workflow.

title: EXPERIENCED VIRTUAL ASSISTANT // INSTAGRAM APPOINTMENT SETTER
description:
We are hiring a proactive, fast-thinking appointment setter to turn new Instagram followers into booked calls with our founder. If you understand social media culture, move with speed, and know how to turn conversations into conversions, this is for you.



THE ROLE

You will be the first point of contact for new followers. Your job is simple: qualify, build rapport, and convert them into booked calls. You will:



• Message new followers daily and convert them into booked calls

• Speak in the founder’s voice and maintain a high-authority brand presence

• Keep prospects engaged and prepped before the call

• Reply to inbound DMs and comments

• Upload content to Instagram

• Track daily numbers and performance in our internal tracker



Full training, scripts, and support are provided. Experience is preferred.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

• You will never run out of leads. We run paid ads to the account, so you will always have fresh conversations and volume to work with.

• No calling or video needed. Messaging only.

• Your earning potential is directly tied to your speed, hunger, and performance.



WHAT WE EXPECT

This is not a “reply when convenient” role. You must be active every day, Monday to Sunday. In DMs, speed matters. If you are slow, you lose the lead.



We want someone who:

• Takes initiative and does not wait to be told what to do

• Moves fast and thinks creatively to convert conversations

• Is social-media and culture savvy

• Wants to make real money and treats this like a performance role, not a hobby



PAY & GROWTH OPPORTUNITY

• Earning potential: $2,000–$3,000/month

• Base salary: starts at $1,000/month (depends on experience)

• Commission paid per qualified booked call you secure

• Included paid training for ongoing skill development



I put this here so I can tell if you actually read this post, and if you're paying attention to details. In your application include the word APPLES anywhere so I know you've read it and are switched on :)



WORK HOURS

• Full time

• Core hours: 12pm–9pm UK time

• Work from anywhere – reply from your phone on the go



This role is for someone hungry to maximise commissions and win. If you're looking for slow-paced, low-effort work, this is not a fit.



REQUIREMENTS

• Strong written English

• Smartphone with Instagram

• Laptop for content uploads and meetings



To apply: Please
 me a short Loom video, in the video tell me a bit about yourself, why you're applying for this role, and what your biggest motivation is right now. Ensure your video starts with the word APPLES.

title: Part-Time Research Assistant — Medical Clinic Lead Generation (Ontario, Canada)
description:
We are a healthcare technology company based in Ontario, Canada. We built a clinic efficiency system (iPad-based) used by physicians to manage patient flow and reduce wasted time between rooms. We need a research assistant to build targeted lists of medical clinics across Ontario that match our ideal customer profile.

This is ongoing, long-term work — not a one-off project.

YOUR TASKS:

— Search Google Maps for family medicine clinics and urgent care/walk-in clinics across Ontario cities

— Check clinic websites for signs of high volume: multiple doctors, walk-in hours, multiple locations, online booking

— Read Google reviews for signals like long wait times, busy clinic, packed waiting rooms (these are good — they are our ideal customer)

— Verify doctor names and phone numbers

— Organize everything into a structured Google Sheet (template provided) with 12 defined columns

— Deliver 50 qualified, verified clinic contacts per week

— Optionally: send a short pre-written
 to clinics on the list (template provided by us)

WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU:

— Strong English reading skills (you will read Canadian clinic websites and patient reviews)

— Excellent attention to detail — accuracy matters more than speed

— Experience with Google Maps research, web research, or lead generation

— Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision once trained

— Reliable internet and consistent weekly availability

— Experience with Google Sheets

NICE TO HAVE:

— Experience in healthcare or medical-related research

— Familiarity with data scraping tools (Outscraper, PhantomBuster, or similar)

— Previous B2B lead research or list-building experience

HOW WE WORK:

— You deliver a Google Sheet weekly with 50 new contacts

— We spot-check 5 contacts per batch for accuracy

— Weekly check-in via chat (Slack or
) — no meetings required

— Clear instructions and templates provided from day one

HOW TO APPLY:

Please include in your application:



A brief message about your experience with online research or lead generation

Any examples of similar work (screenshots or descriptions are fine)

Your available hours and preferred schedule



Top applicants will receive a paid test task ($20 USD) before final hiring decision.

title: A-Player E-commerce Operations / Backend Manager (Shopify Fashion Dropshipping)
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for an elite, highly experienced Backend Operations Manager to take the reins of our fast-growing general fashion dropshipping business.



We are not looking for a basic virtual assistant. We are looking for an "A-Player"—a proactive leader who treats the business as if it were their own. You will be the operational backbone of the company, overseeing everything from A to Z across multiple Shopify stores, organizing the team, and ensuring our backend runs like a well-oiled machine.



What You Will Do:



Total Backend Management: Oversee the day-to-day operations of multiple Shopify fashion dropshipping stores from start to finish.



Team Leadership: Manage, organize, and train our team of assistants and support staff. You will be their main point of contact and standard-setter.



Process Optimization: Identify bottlenecks and write clear, scalable Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for the team to follow.



Quality Control & Troubleshooting: Handle escalations, monitor fulfillment processes, and proactively solve problems before they impact the customer.



Total Operational Control: Manage the daily flow from top to bottom—including daily product quotations, supply chain management, customer service oversight, and store settings. You will monitor employees, deliver regular performance reports, and proactively provide suggestions to constantly improve and grow the business.



Who You Are:



An E-commerce Veteran: You have extensive, hands-on experience specifically in general fashion dropshipping. You know the unique challenges of the apparel niche (sizing, suppliers, quality control, seasonal trends).



A Proven Leader: You have a track record of successfully managing teams and juggling multiple e-commerce stores simultaneously.



Highly Autonomous: You don't wait to be told what to do. You are highly organized, detail-oriented, and thrive in a fast-paced environment.



A Systems Thinker: You know how to build structures, organize workflows, and document processes clearly.



How to Apply:

To ensure you have a strong attention to detail and have read this entire post, please include the word orange at the very beginning of your application. Applications without this will be immediately ignored.



Please answer the following questions in your application:



What specific fashion dropshipping stores have you managed or worked with in the past? (Please provide links or detailed descriptions of the niche and scale).



Describe a time when you stepped in to fix a chaotic backend or team situation. What steps did you take to organize it?



Have you ever written SOPs for an e-commerce team? Briefly explain your process for creating one from scratch.



How many Shopify stores have you managed simultaneously, and what was your strategy for keeping everything organized?



Why do you consider yourself an "A-Player" in the e-commerce space?



Note: If you are not A player, DO NOT APPLY!
